name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Giving Teenagers Gifts for Getting Vaccinated
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The radical measures that Walz is using with his Emergency Powers continues to this day. Remember, just a tad over a year ago he locked us in our homes. Then he put COVID patients in nursing homes and shut down our economy. If that wasn't enough, he forced our youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports. **Now Walz is going to[trick our teenagers](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_to_bribe_minnesotans_into_getting_vaccine_using_your_tax_dollars?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=2) into getting the COVID vaccine by giving them gifts courtesy of YOUR tax dollars. You can't make this stuff up!** Taking a page from Ohio's RINO Governor Mike Dewine, Walz is going to use incentives to coerce our youth into getting vaccinated in order to combat the shrinking numbers of people who are willing to take the risk and get the vaccine. Remember, we still do not know the long term effects of the vaccine. We learned from ObamaCare, which Walz voted for as a Congressman, that radical Democrats DO NOT want private health care decisions. Now we have politicians telling us to "get the jab" and not consult our healthcare professionals. Even worse, Governor Walz held a press conference the other day at the Mall of America. Officials in his Administration [ushered in their own children](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_to_bribe_minnesotans_into_getting_vaccine_using_your_tax_dollars?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=3) as political props to encourage YOUR children to get the vaccine. They have stooped to an all new low! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_to_bribe_minnesotans_into_getting_vaccine_using_your_tax_dollars?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=4) Are we going to sit back and let these politicians continue to destroy our Republic and coerce our children?
## I say NO!
**All of these problems with Walz come down to the fact that Republicans and Democrats have turned a blind eye to unconstitutional, anti-democratic Emergency Powers. The only way to STOP Walz from continuing his unilateral reign over us is to pass the[NEVER AGAIN Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=5) authored by Liberty Champion, Erik Mortensen. ** But we're on the cusp of the **Great Gazelka Sellout**. He's behind closed doors right now, cutting the final deal with Walz and Democrats in the House. We can't let them pass a budget without ensuring the Never Again Bill is passed first. Please contact Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka immediately and tell him to STOP making deals with Walz until the Never Again Bill is passed.
## **Senator Paul Gazelka**
## **Phone: 651-296-4875**
## **Email:[sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn ](mailto:sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn)**
**Sample Script** Sen Gazelka, I can't believe you are agreeing to a budget with Governor Walz without passing the Never Again Bill first. Senate Republicans must stop Walz' further destruction of Minnesota by ensuring he can never unilaterally declare an emergency again. Stop cutting deals with Democrats and pass the Never Again Bill now. **Alternate Script** Sen Gazelka, you are a fraud if you pass a budget without passing the Never Again Bill. I've heard you talk about removing Walz' Emergency Powers, but it sounds like it's all talk - no action. If you don't put your foot down and refuse to pass a budget until the Never Again Bill is passed into law, you really don't care about Walz having unilateral emergency powers. Do the right thing! **Peter, this fight is too important to sit on the sidelines. The legislature will be back in session in June and we can't afford to lose this battle.** Make the call or write the email! Let Gazelka know how many of us there are in Minnesota who reject mask mandates, lockdowns and forced vaccinations. [**If calling and emailing aren't your thing, or if you want to help more, support Action 4 Liberty's phone calling and doorknocking operations with a donation. Let's ELIMINATE Walz' Emergency Powers! Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to keep the pressure on politicians in St Paul.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=6) Our movement continues to grow thanks to your continued support! [**Donations**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=7) fund our operations which help us find new people every day who agree with you and me that Walz' Emergency Powers must be terminated for good! We can't do this without you. Thank you in advance! **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_to_give_our_teenagers&n=10), software for leaders.

On June 5th, I'll be giving a HUGE SPEECH at the North Carolina GOP Convention.

This is my first presidential speech back with the American People and I want to get your input. I'm requesting the help of Patriots across the Nation to help me prepare.

**[Please take the Official Presidential Speech Prep Survey before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so I can review your answers in my Florida office.>>](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxVUF2PgyAQ_DX6hkFUPB986Ef6N8y6rC2NIEFo478_bLzLXdhAMszOzqzqBX4JxFz3gouSN6LlZSPrskhHyGvXnc-nqrzI7iKzmr-1LdRiYVbP4KNxBS4mf_QwtQQ4dSCnplYjAgKnjnc1F1BD3eZz_wjBrVl1ysQt1UoYPRVJzpPaRXYMXsTAkNcI7LloG9gUrfKgV23vLJGMDoEoUS0y58mxNfoXbewxZdUtBjMYUjqarLqSAT0PCRdyx9cleqSEGxwspDpwBONA3236OdLL4b_28DftsFs8HP4oLDaQDUng4KPb_Jom5L5X7q3nWa-yTZu7744-60ozZz1tfdaeMyFi1Co9n82ITo6NQKkY57xkddkBGyc1Mo6qmUpQDSHuZHFJd9gc_XYeosUn-I62129KF5un)**

**I 'll be reviewing ALL RESPONSES tomorrow. **I'll be looking for your answers because your input is critical to my speech.

I 'll be reviewing ALL RESPONSES tomorrow. I'll be looking for your answers because your input is critical to my speech. ********************************************** Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 |

name: U.S. Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Zuckerberg must have read my book
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514242:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "Headline") Peter, Big Tech is taking a page from the liberal playbook - they don't come after me directly. They start a dark-money group and run ads _(on their platforms)_ attacking me. If they are trying to scare me, it isn't working. **I see who they are, and they are TERRIFIED.** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514242:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "Tweet")Big Tech companies like Facebook, Google, and Twitter have abused their power for too long, and they will go to any lengths necessary to stop anyone who tries to stop them. **We must break up the Big Tech monopolies and ensure that big tech treats users equally, or they should face the consequences.** **[Join me in this fight and add your voice against big tech's bias by donating at least $40 Today!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514243:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "Join me in this fight and add your voice against big tech's bias by donating at least $40 Today!")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514242:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "Show your support for free speech") Mark Zuckerberg and his Silicon Valley friends are targeting me. If we give up-**_IF WE DO NOTHING_** -they will control what we hear, read and see. If they don't like your opinion, they will simply take away your voice--they will cancel you. This is **EXACTLY** what the Founding Fathers wanted to prevent with the First Amendment to our Constitution, **[and it is why we have to stand and fight.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514242:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "and it is why we have to stand and fight.")** Now that we have exposed Big Tech's playbook, they will just come up with another one. **They won't give up without a fight,_and neither will we._** **[We need to be ready to keep fighting, no matter what they throw at us and we must never cede our First Amendment Rights to ANYONE!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514242:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "We need to be ready to keep
fighting, no matter what they throw at us and we must never cede our First Amendment Rights to ANYONE!")** Thank you for fulfilling your responsibility as an American and standing up for our principles. Sincerely,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514242:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57514242:JyC-cylNY:m:1:3103520637:E5D10051BDCBE426D211D4701703B18B:r "Show your support for free speech")

name: David McIntosh
subject: What are we going to do about it?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLUB FOR GROWTH ACTION AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
The battle for the future of the Republican Party has come to Ohio.
Dear Peter,

The battle for the future of the Republican Party has come to Ohio. **The question is: What are we going to do about it?**

**Conservative fighter Max Miller** is running against incumbent Republican Anthony Gonzalez in the Republican primary.

**Max Miller is a former White House senior advisor to President Trump** , a former Marine Corp Reservist, and a staunch conservative.

**Anthony Gonzalez is a liberal Republican who voted to impeach President Trump** and supported big-government spending bills.

The choice in this battle is easy. **[Donate to Max Miller's campaign today so we can send a real conservative to Congress in this seat.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58126756:WQYpsvdNU:m:1:2016711367:C4F3FB53E9DD3741B1BC86DC3C77322C:r)**

| [** DONATE NOW **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58126756:WQYpsvdNU:m:1:2016711367:C4F3FB53E9DD3741B1BC86DC3C77322C:r)
---

Donald Trump has already endorsed Max Miller, but he needs conservatives to rally around his campaign.

**"Max Miller is a wonderful person who did a great job at the White House and will be a fantastic Congressman. He is a Marine Veteran, a son of Ohio, and a true PATRIOT...Max Miller has my Complete and Total Endorsement."
\- Donald J. Trump**
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58126756:WQYpsvdNU:m:1:2016711367:C4F3FB53E9DD3741B1BC86DC3C77322C:r)
Remember, RINO Anthony Gonzalez will have the Establishment's backing. It's up to us to join Trump and support conservative Max Miller.

Max Miller is a full-spectrum conservative who will **uphold the Constitution, fight for term limits** , and will proudly stand up to the **radical Biden-Harris agenda.**

But we need to make sure Max Miller wins his primary against Anthony Gonzalez.

[** DONATE ASAP **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58126756:WQYpsvdNU:m:1:2016711367:C4F3FB53E9DD3741B1BC86DC3C77322C:r)
---

**Do we want to send Never Trumper Anthony Gonzalez back to Congress or do we want to help elect a true, unapologetic conservative like Max Miller?**

If you believe, like Donald Trump, that we need Max Miller in Congress, **[please donate to Miller's campaign right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58126756:WQYpsvdNU:m:1:2016711367:C4F3FB53E9DD3741B1BC86DC3C77322C:r)**

Thank you for joining us and Donald Trump in this important fight.

Sincerely,

David McIntosh
President, Club for Growth Action

name: Action Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Should Trump face criminal charges? (one-click poll)
body:
Charges may be imminent in New York, and other states are considering them as well. Is this good or bad?
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/pollshouldtrumpfacecriminalcharges2?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend,
### Poll: Should Trump face criminal charges?
News broke this week that [criminal charges](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6454c83-a24d-473b-acea-d2c4da3087b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) are being considered against the Trump organization in New York state, and that a [grand jury](https://default.salsalabs.org/T287f7e5c-69ab-4015-bf95-c9cbf48db26b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) has begun work in NYC. Some argue that criminal charges are necessary and long overdue. But others -- including some Trump opponents -- argue that it is time to move on.
### **What do you think? Click on your choice below:**
* ### ["Yes! Trump should face criminal charges!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49340ba7-4926-48b5-b883-7ae0efc9af28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* ### ["No! Trump should not face charges!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b415767-440a-4d2f-a9b3-b787c80ff643/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We'll post the results on our [Facebook page](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98e3b025-9c5b-410d-bdb9-182a4193241e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) later this week (don't want to get emails from us? Click the "unsubscribe" link at the bottom). [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c9a4409-2ddc-468e-904b-1b3d8f6d6b4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**Time for justice, or... time to move on?**
---
| | |
**Want to take action on another front? Here's a few options:**
* [List of current LeftAction actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c5122ea-0c95-4980-bc9f-578baab981cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* Want more? Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b65c4db-3797-4d13-b7a9-bbd567aca704/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd4f274e-e938-475e-bc3b-fbe9e8408830/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* Want to unsubscribe? Click the link at the bottom
* If you can, [make a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec3ece08-07fc-40d9-b77a-ef544fdf4558/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to help us cover expenses

body:

---
| Peter,

Recently, one of the most reputable election rating sites, Crystal Ball, announced that Abigail's seat is currently considered a pure toss-up in 2022.

This swing seat will be hard to defend, especially as dark money groups are already spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to spread lies about Abigail.

**As Abigail 's finance director, it's my job to be candid about this race. We are up against some opponents with deep pockets, and in a race that's bound to be neck-and-neck, every dollar counts.

[_That 's why I'm asking if you'd consider a contribution ahead of our end-of-month deadline to defend this seat and keep Abigail in Congress. ->_](https://act.myngp.com/el/6fzcVG9R4g0N5kn1ihByqal-KH3rSdSbo6LAQql4L08=/h6Y0bQfJk3zB4U84UgJvz013REi3kyZDPPQ792XBlRA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210526-1-EM&amount=25)**

This toss-up rating could be complicated even further by redistricting. If we think Abigail's seat is hard to win now, **it could get even harder.**

The end-of-month deadline is an important one for our campaign. It will allow us to plan how much we can spend on efforts to help correct the record of the lies dark money groups are spreading about Abigail.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: We Will Not Surrender
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XZVJy2Trya0c743Zxs048c_VDJLnE3WIiEmjD9OBZRLGpiY-kEbOPbcmiaWJYJP2nPTM6GWPkdEcxGBq4IzdfV86TiplOeWzotH4hcwpqMF940vXTpHE1uNJ1kCVBNeNsksJVjLq4U8_t3rCAbyuKPB4Xwy7DnyofszVlc5Yv98AD-9llJpUATyaQ6CYOpXC&c=fd7LdFkp383DiHT7dFtZofo-Mz1NmIuHN62Ih61cQWGsqAb6qPYf5A==&ch=TirnTzOjo5kkbyBBj5-iPIEKphoqB2rW9CQ5H9Y34Wg6EWJcsD0Dtw==&jrc=1)
---

name: Team Northam
subject: Deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/T7De0gV11PlOokh_XE_ND2MvquGj8qhjMWqrFUbtbnA=/Kf0dvzfWRydnGgN_dDPOijsH_zBzTMaECHA8Tf0xwjc=)
---
Friend, Tonight at midnight is the final fundraising deadline before the Democratic primaries in just under two weeks. Governor Northam and our team are laser-focused on protecting our slim Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and securing another statewide sweep because there's just too much at stake. **[Our progress is on the ballot this November so please contribute as generously as you can today so we can keep Virginia blue.](https://act.myngp.com/el/T7De0gV11PlOokh_XE_ND2MvquGj8qhjMWqrFUbtbnA=/leROX5FGLRsTPUEkzPgikENbDaW-fYLqPg0BtYDcW74=)** Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin and the extreme Republican statewide ticket are out of touch with our mainstream Virginia values and will do everything in their power to turn back the clocks on our progress. Under Democratic leadership in Virginia, we have passed historic gun safety legislation, repealed medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's healthcare, repealed racially discriminatory language in the Virginia Code, made Election Day a state holiday, and made Virginia the first Southern state to provide sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. We are proud to be the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants, and we have made monumental progress on criminal justice reform by becoming the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty. _**[Please rush a contribution before our deadline at midnight so we can keep Virginia Blue and build on the progress we 've made.](https://act.myngp.com/el/T7De0gV11PlOokh_XE_ND2MvquGj8qhjMWqrFUbtbnA=/leROX5FGLRsTPUEkzPgikENbDaW-fYLqPg0BtYDcW74=)**_ \- Team Northam

| | Peter, **Short story first: Congress is debating a historic infrastructure bill. I want that bill passed now and I want it green.** [**So please sign this petition I have joined: let's lend our voices to this generational effort.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29828153/287631652/-1036331184?source=2021Infrastructure_JM&referrer=group-john-mcguigan-for-pennsylvania&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-john-mcguigan-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2021-05-green-infrastructure-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGMzNDUyYi1mMWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zwwBvsOckZbXpjouEqaQmEIzD7EdOo54_08UOTXj1wM=&emci=14994588-78bd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e4c3452b-f1be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356) Longer story: Climate change is very, very real. That's not a serious debate anymore, except in the US Senate, where any idea goes to stagnate and die under Mitch McConnell. We don't need another political slapfight, or half-measures. It's time to get to work. President Biden warned only Monday that 2021 may bring more hurricanes and wildfires--we need action! We need to rebuild America. I'm talking roads, bridges, and buildings, some of the basics. For too long, politicians have treated these two goals – stopping climate change and rebuilding our infrastructure – as separate projects. _Unsurprisingly, they were wrong._ We can create green jobs, rebuild our country from the ground-up, and fight climate change; in fact, infrastructure projects create an opportunity to take the dramatic environmental and economic steps the moment demands – but only if Congress has the guts to act. **When I ask you to join me as I call on Congress to make the infrastructure bill as bold and green as possible, it's because I believe that each and every voice lent to this effort moves us one step closer to getting it done.** [**Please sign the petition and urge Congress to take aggressive action right now on a bold and green infrastructure bill.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29828154/287631659/-1036331184?source=2021Infrastructure_JM&referrer=group-john-mcguigan-for-pennsylvania&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-john-mcguigan-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2021-05-green-infrastructure-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGMzNDUyYi1mMWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zwwBvsOckZbXpjouEqaQmEIzD7EdOo54_08UOTXj1wM=&emci=14994588-78bd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e4c3452b-f1be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356) clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | Folks — This is critical! We’re over halfway through the quarter but less than half the way to our fundraising goal. Not good, but there's still time! = = = Here’s why we have to ask: We are over a year away from the election, but special interest groups in Washington have already zeroed in on Ron and WI-03, and they will spend whatever it takes to spread their dishonest attack ads and lies. If we don’t show them we have what it takes to fight back, they will keep flooding Wisconsin with more dark-money attacks and flat-out lies because they will do anything to flip this seat. We can't ever let that happen! We’ve fought this battle before, and we know what it takes to win: YOU! = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | | Team Kind will never back down. If we have you with us, we will fight off the Republican attacks and continue delivering for the working folks and families in Wisconsin who need it most. There's so much work left to do, but no one can stop us from moving our state and country to a better place if we continue to fight forward together. For Wisconsin, Team Kind | | | | | | = = | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene is expelled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Dear Peter -- For the third time this year, Nancy Pelosi's
Democrats are working to EXPEL me from Congress.
And unless I have the resources to defend
myself and fight back in the public sphere, I could be removed
from Congress in just a couple weeks.
STAND WITH MTG. FIGHT BACK AGAINST NANCY
PELOSI. CHIP IN $25 RIGHT AWAY

A petition demanding Nancy Pelosi remove me
from Congress surpassed 100,000 signatures from radical
hate-America leftists.
And now, Nancy Pelosi's top lieutenant Steny
Hoyer, the Democrat Majority Leader in the House, has set his
sights on me.

STAND WITH MTG. FIGHT BACK AGAINST NANCY
PELOSI. CHIP IN $25 RIGHT AWAY
This is an important development, because
Steny Hoyer and Jim McGovern decide which bills comes up for a
vote.
As you can see, I need your help right away.
Make no mistake, unless you help me fight
back right now, they will bring the vote to the floor to kick me
out of Congress. . .
And they'll have the backing of Nancy Pelosi,
the Jihad Squad, and every Democrat in the House.
That's why I need your help to survive this
battle for a third time in just the last three months.
My team calculated the numbers and if we can
get 5,000 new donations with an average contribution of $15, $25,
or $35. . .we will have the resources available to fight back and
DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS' most recent attack on me.
Will please help fill my "Stand with MTG" war
chest with a generous contribution of $25 so that the
Democrats will think twice before trying to kick me out?
Mail, text, email, phone calls, digital ads,
radio and TV ads. It all cost money and I must contact my voters
to let them know the truth.
So you see why your emergency contribution of
$25 is so critical.
The simple fact is the Democrats couldn't get
me the first time.
Or the second time.
But now they're hoping the third times a
charm.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Never before has a Republican been under
attack like me since the Democrats tried to impeach and remove
President Trump from office.
Over the weekend, Democrats and the Fake News
Media cranked up their calls to KICK ME OUT of Congress.
CNN, MSNBC, PBS, ABC, NBC, CBS. . .
They went on all the channels demanding I be
removed from Congress because I dare to tell the truth about
their Socialist schemes.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Can I please count on an emergency
contribution of $25 right away?
You see, money talks in Washington, DC.
If they think I'm weak and don't have the
dollars to battle with them, they'll run me out.
But if they know I have the financial support
of the PEOPLE, they know no matter what they do, the voters will
be with me.
I'm enemy #1 of the Democrats and the Fake
News Media.
Please STAND WITH ME by making a generous
contribution to help me FIGHT BACK and WIN today!
For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

And they'll have the backing of Nancy Pelosi, the Jihad Squad, and every Democrat in the House. That's why I need your help to survive this battle for a third time in just the last three months. My team calculated the numbers and if we can get 5,000 new donations with an average contribution of $15, $25, or $35. . .we will have the resources available to fight back and DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS' most recent attack on me. Will please help fill my "Stand with MTG" war chest with a generous contribution of $25 so that the Democrats will think twice before trying to kick me out? Mail, text, email, phone calls, digital ads, radio and TV ads. It all cost money and I must contact my voters to let them know the truth. So you see why your emergency contribution of $25 is so critical. The simple fact is the Democrats couldn't get me the first time. Or the second time. But now they're hoping the third times a charm. STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25 Never before has a Republican been under attack like me since the Democrats tried to impeach and remove President Trump from office. Over the weekend, Democrats and the Fake News Media cranked up their calls to KICK ME OUT of Congress. CNN, MSNBC, PBS, ABC, NBC, CBS. . . They went on all the channels demanding I be removed from Congress because I dare to tell the truth about their Socialist schemes. STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25 Can I please count on an emergency contribution of $25 right away? You see, money talks in Washington, DC. If they think I'm weak and don't have the dollars to battle with them, they'll run me out. But if they know I have the financial support of the PEOPLE, they know no matter what they do, the voters will be with me. I'm enemy #1 of the Democrats and the Fake News Media. Please STAND WITH ME by making a generous contribution to help me FIGHT BACK and WIN today! Peter,
I'll make it quick. In honor of Memorial Day Weekend, we’ve chosen to cut off our May fundraising deadline at midnight tonight instead of Monday. That means we need to raise another $3,670 to close the gap and we seriously can’t do it without you.
Will you help us get over this hump? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]

We all know the people we’re up against. They represent the wealthy and powerful, unconnected to the needs and best interests of the people of Wisconsin — just take a look at Ron Johnson’s latest headline-making comments:

“Sen. Ron Johnson Doesn't Care If Your Wages Don't Cover Childcare. 'The Marketplace' Has Spoken”
---

Ron Johnson argued that wages are rising too quickly, that child care isn’t an issue for workers, and all workers should be forced off the federal unemployment subsidy. _He has proven time and time again he will never understand the struggles of working class Wisconsinites._

**We’re a people-powered grassroots campaign.** We have a grassroots army that is ready to take on the billionaires and millionaires. Now is the time to PROVE IT to our opponents and all who doubt us.

clean_body: | | Hi team, Did you have a chance to see Tom’s message about our critical fundraising deadline? While our opponents can rely on self-funding or their millionaire friends, this campaign relies on you. We need to prove our grassroots strength and demonstrate that big money donors and corporate PACs cannot and will not control this election. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = Begin Forwarded Message from Tom Nelson: Friend, Even though our election is still a year away, it doesn't mean that we don’t have critical deadlines that we must meet. May 31st is our end-of-month deadline, and we need to show strong grassroots support to keep pace with our multi-millionaire and billionaire opponents. While my opponents can rely on self-funding or their millionaire friends on Wall Street, I rely on you. Or I’ll have another garage sale to raise money to fund our campaign. However, I’m running out of stuff to sell. = = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We all know the people we’re up against. They represent the wealthy and powerful, unconnected to the needs and best interests of the people of Wisconsin — just take a look at Ron Johnson’s latest headline-making comments: “Sen. Ron Johnson Doesn't Care If Your Wages Don't Cover Childcare. 'The Marketplace' Has Spoken” Ron Johnson argued that wages are rising too quickly, that child care isn’t an issue for workers, and all workers should be forced off the federal unemployment subsidy. He has proven time and time again he will never understand the struggles of working class Wisconsinites. We’re a people-powered grassroots campaign. We have a grassroots army that is ready to take on the billionaires and millionaires. Now is the time to PROVE IT to our opponents and all who doubt us. = | = Thank you for your continued support and dedication, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin ** Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

name: Ben Zimmermann
subject: They’ve seen our wins, so now they’re changing the rules
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29838867/287664776/-591528114?refcode=em0527_espymostactive&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWM2YmY4ZC0wMWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9lLeL-GnyQfZvsI5QRfY8FZLswUriHGeqHIsT37Ppw=) Hi team, Our team at The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiative campaigns since 2016, improving over 17 million lives by winning progressive change directly at the ballot box. We’ve faced our fair share of attacks, but what we’re seeing now is unprecedented: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29838868/287664777/-591528114?refcode=em0527_espymostactive&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWM2YmY4ZC0wMWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9lLeL-GnyQfZvsI5QRfY8FZLswUriHGeqHIsT37Ppw=) The New York Times reported that just this year, extremist politicians have “introduced **144 bills to restrict the ballot initiative processes** in 32 states.” _**Our successes have painted a target on our back.**_ **They’ve seen us win ballot initiatives that raise wages and expand health care, so now they’re changing the rules and attacking democracy. Here’s what our team at The Fairness Project is doing in response to these desperate, anti-democratic attacks:
First, **we’re going to keep planning, advising, and running ballot initiative campaigns to win real change in red and blue states across the country**. We’ve launched a campaign to expand Medicaid in South Dakota next year, and we’re getting ready to launch more campaigns to raise wages, guarantee paid leave, curb predatory lending, and change lives in the months to come.
_But we’re also ready to fight back against these attacks on voting rights._
**We’re ready to fight back in courts, in the streets, in the media -- whatever it takes to protect democracy. Too much is at stake.**
**[But we need your help in the face of these 144 bills attacking ballot initiatives -- can you rush a donation to help us fight back?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29838871/287664780/-591528114?refcode=em0527_espymostactive&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWM2YmY4ZC0wMWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9lLeL-GnyQfZvsI5QRfY8FZLswUriHGeqHIsT37Ppw=)**

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: I was told I might regret this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:

And I was told I might regret doing so.

Heads up, friend – **we have our**** first opponent in this governor's race: a far-right extremist who says she's running to "continue President Trump's fight."**
You know all those times I told you we need to defeat GOP extremism? This is _exactly_ what I was talking about. **[We need to fight back immediately – can you rush $5 or more right now to help us hit our $5,000 rapid-response goal and make sure we have what it takes to defeat this new extremist candidate and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29840466/287672333/1742512187?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk108-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODE3MWE0ZC0wNWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsnFESjWi4hRnHOD8tQ4NNjPrcEXPUQqcNFyRNzKIl8=)**

My opponent has already shown us she'll be bad for Arizona: She's aggressively pro-Trump, a fervent supporter of his ineffective border wall, is yet to accept President Biden's victory and is all about putting corporate special interests above working people. But to me, the biggest red flag is her obsession with _continuing_ the status quo.
**We cannot afford to _continue_ anything President Trump started. We cannot afford to _continue_ the failed leadership of Arizona ****Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward. We cannot _continue_ down the path that led to Arizona having the 49th-best schools and 45th-best health care system. I'm running to _solve_ those problems instead. **
Look, friend, I've taken on uphill battles before. I went from plumbing with my dad in Nogales to working in the Obama administration and running a small business. But this is a whole new challenge: **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is already calling this race a toss-up, and the GOP will spend MILLIONS to prop up my extremist new opponent and defeat our people-powered movement. **
**[This $5,000 goal is our first major test in this new stage of the race – and friend, we _cannot_ fail. Election Day is less than two weeks away, and we almost have the money we need to spread our message to every corner of our Commonwealth and get out the vote. But we still have some work left to do. [**If you 're with me, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign before our deadline tonight at midnight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UE0s2oGkAp0nqBV3dQrP_9uWBiMKEW_p_b7sDquPZ0w=/Tj14EDr6ir9sckbOVeHTvOeSvy9MQgteM1jy92ZGyOs=) Governor Ralph Northam, former Attorney General Mary Sue Terry, Congresswoman Elaine Luria, Congressman Bobby Scott, and over 30 of my colleagues in the state legislature have endorsed my candidacy because they believe we have the vision and values to beat Republicans in November and reimagine this old office in a new way. name: Governor Kristi Noem
subject: Biden is spiraling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
I need your help to make our voices heard...

| | |
---
Friend,

Last night a few of my Republican colleagues and I spoke at a GOP governor town hall on Fox News. The consensus was clear: Biden has lost control.

Biden's border crisis is now spilling over the border states into all states. This reckless ignorance has gone on for too long. I joined several Republican governors in demanding action from this White House, but President Biden and Vice President Harris have done **NOTHING.**
[HELP GOP GOVS STOP BIDEN ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012VOknR9LGjKhkiegUMMAH7ZFGRGwFwiaTCSjffSj8EVB7fL1FqCZ8dmz6vmfliOokM-WpVrFMLPn-Wtmm07OGo5SMDmG96hIpFkaACuokIsiQ7m82up3ycL7-opDu2AkpoD1QEXGMoWMZmxO_lOFEC-OojHh1yENjwm_aKvcf3Z--JKu0u7LrX69oOpligZzhzmCaQ554785E0IPB9pLAsSQbh9pZ_6YggOaGvJIwjdgOgPsn4noy4xBIABD5V5j022TSlXzga3980MGKshHqggA5lS2EbcqJVraAeK8WFMW-w8kfMGs3nVP6DfXAFfSbD7vm0YfJ6Em2vNUDKF67m0sVnmx30dBp-_XUed-wKa-CeFqG8X3nKhpoxQA4-Cv7n4MBOW1fLvAq01HUklJc80Ffdkwe2_w3YivOHYqS-D4YPoz0q3KviRMcj9fMF1S&c=pmdRIrcEZLMplnqYbSmcfNRZTqJvuQqygKz2SiVuiWlay0XroSZmVA==&ch=yf_ExEUcpDi41_0YdaojmOb-td1QN_4APSgupvvQkO3ImJydJR0Z0A==)
Biden's decision to cut the Keystone Pipeline has led to gas shortages and cost our country millions of jobs. This President continues to threaten the economic recovery GOP-led states have experienced.

This administration has clearly lost control, which is why we need GOP governors who will stand up to Biden and get our country back on track. clean_body: I need your help to make our voices heard... | | | Friend, Last night a few of my Republican colleagues and I spoke at a GOP governor town hall on Fox News. The consensus was clear: Biden has lost control. Biden's border crisis is now spilling over the border states into all states. This reckless ignorance has gone on for too long. I joined several Republican governors in demanding action from this White House, but President Biden and Vice President Harris have done NOTHING. == Biden's decision to cut the Keystone Pipeline has led to gas shortages and cost our country millions of jobs. This President continues to threaten the economic recovery GOP-led states have experienced. This administration has clearly lost control, which is why we need GOP governors who will stand up to Biden and get our country back on track. == == == == == == Republican governors are not allowing this administration to burden our states with their responsibility. We have made it clear they need to fix the crises they caused - == == Thank you for your support, Kristi Noem | | Paid for by the Republican Governors Association. name: Cathy McMorris Rodgers

body:
We are on the cusp of putting Conservative leaders in charge of our nation's economic future.

_****_

[](https://secure.winred.com/mcmorris-rodgers-win-the-future-fund/support-cathy-and-republicans/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_cathy-mcmorris-rodgers_t1066513-1863&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_conservative-leadership-matters)

Hello Friend,

It's clear Democrats' policies continue to make America worse rather than better.

**But of course** , President Biden and his Democrats have made it clear thus far that they have very different intentions for healing our economy than my fellow Republicans and I do.

House Democrats have backed many policies that they believe will help America, BUT LET ME SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT:

* Extraordinarily high taxes=kill millions of good-paying jobs and remove the ability for innovation.

* Implementing an extraordinarily unrealistic and radical Green New Deal=Eliminating America's hard-fought energy independence & costing trillions of taxpayer dollars.

* Other massive spending bills that are misleading and give partisan funding to Nancy Pelosi's re-election campaign=more dependency on government handouts-all at the expense of the American taxpayer.

[**Conservatives are working on a pro-recovery, pro-jobs agenda for America**](https://secure.winred.com/mcmorris-rodgers-win-the-future-fund/support-cathy-and-republicans/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_cathy-mcmorris-rodgers_t1066513-1863&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_conservative-leadership-matters), not looking for unrealistic solutions high up in the clouds and having somebody pay for the inevitable consequences.

_**we are on the cusp of putting Conservative leaders in charge of our nation 's economic future, all I'm asking is for your help to get us across the finish line.**_

[**Chip in now to help Republicans WIN back the House and stop these gross overreaches of government into our lives.**](https://secure.winred.com/mcmorris-rodgers-win-the-future-fund/support-cathy-and-republicans/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_cathy-mcmorris-rodgers_t1066513-1863&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_conservative-leadership-matters)

**Keep our nation on track -> Donate Today**

[Donate Now](https://secure.winred.com/mcmorris-rodgers-win-the-future-fund/support-cathy-and-republicans/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_cathy-mcmorris-rodgers_t1066513-1863&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_conservative-leadership-matters)

Thank you,

| | Friends, I watched in horror as the Capitol was overrun on January 6th by an insurrectionist mob seeking to overturn a fair and free election. They did not succeed. But they left an open wound in our democracy that we cannot heal until we have uncovered how the attack happened and taken steps to ensure it can never happen again. The American people deserve to know exactly what transpired on January 6th. I was proud to join my House colleagues to pass legislation that would create an independent, bipartisan commission to investigate the attack on the Capitol. Seeking the truth shouldn’t be a partisan issue -- but just 35 House Republicans voted in favor of the January 6th commission. **Until the GOP becomes morally capable of putting country before party, they cannot be allowed to lead --[if you’re with me, will you chip in to my end-of-month fundraising goal to defend VA-02 and protect our Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29843153/287683569/-1049428155?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210527_FR_EOMJan6_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmZiNTdmZS0wY2JmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylkoN2AAXHBPF7uEGIQNeX79LlCavKKHA9zit1oS3dY=)** | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29843164/287683584/-1049428155?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210527_FR_EOMJan6_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmZiNTdmZS0wY2JmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylkoN2AAXHBPF7uEGIQNeX79LlCavKKHA9zit1oS3dY=)

Elaine Luria

Peter,

I am facing my biggest fundraising deadline to date Monday at midnight - **but Monday also happens to be a very important day, Memorial Day.**

As a U.S. veteran myself, I do not feel it is right to send my usual end-of-the-month fundraising email on a day meant to honor some of America’s greatest heroes.

**Monday should be reserved for honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice to preserve the greatest country in human history.** [**That is why my team and I decided to move our deadline up 24 hours, to Sunday at 11:59PM,**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=eaa0c424a188400cbf9d950bd883fee8&_e=JFeYgO4-L2wUjlrF1txIayX4JnINzIgt6fOUX34lT-wyaj7t_9-n22u--ht5gbwMsRDLlkITMXFSG2cO5srf_823z-uTA-fPV-ZPTHqF1ImxZCHEh9KM5i0Bb0LiiP3EAuQ5Jt-nPRppKGVxhaqqyNp4u2RwPZ7OI9pwbmpGd9FKA69kvlG3udOB3Jp05pfujz4QrizRvCFHcQbV9e0OR87H3IE7rtOONIofUwJVIkTXmpusQOOZ1EAbyzxfGVzmz75bIIk-OTVIxzCl5Ah5DlkGjGO6FZ7Aq8WLts0w77eLTCsyxbHANAOz7s3UzP-lPHnZaVnCzd7gVgfiBDWtD8KwYcKWGJYdxtS_ehEuW-eWUz-mAH_s2PoY9TJaK0FKHbxjzi72XhIYUhugQzwGV6zIOyF902TDma06N-wc9kuhRAepAKTOh9EIDepWGrkiBItqoKRF2vX6kRvfsAiqgQ%3D%3D) so we can spend Monday honoring our servicemen and women.

name: Navarre for Congress HQ
subject: Stewart’s plans Re: A different kind of leader
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
The clock is ticking on our end-of-month goal to raise $6,000 to elect Stewart to Congress. We only have a few days left and we still need to raise $4,789 so we wanted to make sure you saw his message from yesterday.
Stewart will go to Washington to advocate for you and your family. That’s something our district desperately needs.
So let’s make sure we have a representative we can count on. Help us hit our end-of-the-month goal by donating $10 today! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email&amount=10]
Thank you for your continued support,
Navarre for Congress HQ
--- Forwarded Message ---
Peter,
In the Marines, we never let partisan politics get in the way of accomplishing the mission. I want to bring that culture to Washington because I deeply believe we must deliver meaningful results to our fellow Americans to restore their belief in our basic institutions of government.
Congress must address the challenges that are right in front of us. The nation’s leadership must be willing to do the hard work to expand access to healthcare, clean up our polluted rivers, fix our crumbling infrastructure and bring home real results to Americans.
I believe that it is time for a new kind of politician to represent our district. One who understands how to restore trust in our democracy -- one who will work hard for the people of this district.
I will go to Congress and do the job, but I need your help to get there.
We’re trying to raise $6,000 by May 31st to head into the summer with the wind at our backs. Can you chip in $10 today to help out? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email]
Have you had enough of politics as usual? Me too, and that is why I am running!
I hope you will join our movement today. Any amount is appreciated! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-eom-sn?refcode=210527-email]
Best,
Stewart
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Join us tonight at 6:00 pm PT / 9:00 pm ET for special political groups call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

I hope this note finds you safe and well.

Thanks to your work electing Democrats, COVID relief continues to reach Americans across the nation. Over 250 million vaccines have been injected into arms. More than 160 million checks are in people’s pockets. And millions more have been secured to help our veterans and military families who have struggled throughout the pandemic.

But we need more. We must keep fighting to meet the people’s needs and priorities by investing in once-in-a-century plans that revitalize our physical and human infrastructure and help us emerge from COVID with equity and opportunity.

Critical to advancing our agenda is ensuring we elect our incredible candidate in New Mexico, Melanie Stansbury whose special election is on Tuesday, June 1st. Melanie is the Democratic nominee to succeed our former colleague, Interior Secretary Deb Haaland. Melanie is a scientist, legislator, and champion of public lands and diverse communities.

With so much at stake, we are thrilled Melanie and other special guests will be joining us for our political call tonight, May 27 at 6:00 pm PT / 9:00 pm ET ahead of Memorial Day and the Special Election next Tuesday, June 1.

Register here!

Thank you for all you do,

NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25]

SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]

Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a52193b4-0fbf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/d54f39b8-12bf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTRmMzliOC0xMmJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7YabVav0r2OIrEyVcUYKOiC4ZzqGL_uStX7ksm2xDB0=&id=117907000 .

Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW
Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005
United States

| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oWq_g9RGenII1c_ldLu2tXXzGc2fOkV3mqChuOPrMKoIeWom__b9GLOoKf5r5GL3HENNEHcYO7SM6lA-KbBkqK8q9O1uuBLy2EbLLvWJkt1-aZdXE-oui3qOIxIeqaXx-xe3gldg5-6Msoempmnt5_hDP32FbeCYSCm5d6Yp626jfUpDea8ewyKRI1aMF5wT&c=-rP-Sh5XsbfXqYO0aj1taqKdT0xYCIUNtqSpR0fsYKJhtfdFBZuYMA==&ch=gTOEqFo66siBaFNk6NrHMGZP4_ttVO-gyhkKSY2eDoGUiYjQPywuzA==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki doesn't understand the crisis that is occurring at our southern border. When discussing questions regarding President Biden and VP Harris visiting the border to take in and understand the developing humanitarian crisis, Psaki described it as "maddening."
Psaki's ignorance is on full display. If answering questions from journalists upsets her, then she should find another line of work.
She either hasn't seen the suffering of migrants attempting to cross into our country or she's purposefully ignoring it. Regardless, she has no right to ignore this situation and get mad that people are asking her questions about why our President isn't doing his job in securing our borders.
---
| | | [SUPPORT BORDER SECURITY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oWq_g9RGenII1c_ldLu2tXXzGc2fOkV3mqChuOPrMKoIeWom__b9GLOoKf5r5GL3HENNEHcYO7SM6lA-KbBkqK8q9O1uuBLy2EbLLvWJkt1-aZdXE-oui3qOIxIeqaXx-xe3gldg5-6Msoempmnt5_hDP32FbeCYSCm5d6Yp626jfUpDea8ewyKRI1aMF5wT&c=-rP-Sh5XsbfXqYO0aj1taqKdT0xYCIUNtqSpR0fsYKJhtfdFBZuYMA==&ch=gTOEqFo66siBaFNk6NrHMGZP4_ttVO-gyhkKSY2eDoGUiYjQPywuzA==&jrc=1)
---
| Jen Psaki clearly doesn't understand how immigration flows affect border states and America as a whole. We are under siege by the cartels and human traffickers that are pouring drugs and people across the border.
Now more than ever, we need to secure our border and end the crisis that President Biden created. clean_body: \- | Did you see this article, Peter? HUFFPOST: From Dr. Seuss To Chicken Wings: Conservatives Blame Everything On Joe Biden.= This headline is absurd, but we can’t just laugh it off. Republicans will try (literally!) anything to block any real progress from happening. So as President Biden proposes popular, meaningful policies for our country, Republicans have to resort to childish — and blatantly false — attacks on his record. Here at Unite the Country, it’s up to us to spread the word and push back against these (laughable) headlines. That’s why our end-of-month deadline is so important. Hitting our deadline means we’re able to invest in ads to tell the country exactly what Biden’s agenda is and support Democrats everywhere. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Team Unite = = * Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment. Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. = Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Hello Friend,

It's clear Democrats' policies continue to make America worse rather than better.

**But of course** , President Biden and his Democrats have made it clear thus far that they have very different intentions for healing our economy than my fellow Republicans and I do.

House Democrats have backed many policies that they believe will help America, BUT LET ME SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT:

* Extraordinarily high taxes=kill millions of good-paying jobs and remove the ability for innovation.

* Implementing an extraordinarily unrealistic and radical Green New Deal=Eliminating America's hard-fought energy independence & costing trillions of taxpayer dollars.

* Other massive spending bills that are misleading and give partisan funding to Nancy Pelosi's re-election campaign=more dependency on government handouts-all at the expense of the American taxpayer.

[**Conservatives are working on a pro-recovery, pro-jobs agenda for America**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9803278/224717773/201390/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=569c19df), not looking for unrealistic solutions high up in the clouds and having somebody pay for the inevitable consequences.

_**we are on the cusp of putting Conservative leaders in charge of our nation 's economic future, all I'm asking is for your help to get us across the finish line.**_

[**Chip in now to help Republicans WIN back the House and stop these gross overreaches of government into our lives.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9803278/224717773/201390/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=35cbc619)

Our future is on the line. Let's take a stand today to fight for it!

Thank you,

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Falling Short
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Our May fundraising deadline is coming up soon, and we were hoping you could possibly lend a hand. Can you give us a minute to lay out the details?
We’ve been crunching the numbers and we need a surge of support today to hit our 50,000 contribution goal.
This deadline is critical, because One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, recently dropped a **_six-figure ad buy_** in Arizona attacking Mark.
Our fundraising deadline is on Monday and we haven’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped. So here’s the deal:
We need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to hitting our goal.
Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can keep Mark in the Senate.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation before our May fundraising deadline? We need your help to hit our 50,000 contribution goal so we can generate the resources to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210527-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=678_6688874_1bLXFr&akid=678%2E6688874%2E1bLXFr)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210527-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=678_6688874_1bLXFr&akid=678%2E6688874%2E1bLXFr)**
With everyone pitching in just a little more it’ll allow us to hit our goal and be ready for anything that happens as we work day in and day out to hold this seat and fight for progress that will improve people’s lives.
So thank you in advance for chipping in!
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210527-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=678_6688874_1bLXFr&akid=678%2E6688874%2E1bLXFr)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=678%2E6688874%2E1bLXFr).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Arizona
body:
These Democrats and their media allies are working overtime to try to attack, undermine, and spread lies about America’s Audit, even though the proces*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c71edfeb4f8468585e6fbc5d7178639&_e=LkexT8upeqV0HITURoRhVpuv0g7ZzSEhEkMjXoUJ7hjnwCgj4O-ETPyLeReac4iTAvAROl2y7Ti8-SM_ZwaADmxuGbf5wT4OofIWwVAKslp9qzNii0tzILlt4CbpikM9K5Jm4s5bFpQ-_nZKoyZeU7NGB2WxfCZP9QREUvhp_2jAabUfXaXfGL_DYyNIyzmSypwM_AC0Hjcpsl8QAd04oMOrNBOJs5ikVU7dxBt3j3cBE6IWa587F-zH4Z-bPaXNwm2kTCJym05ZkMJFmdUBgYsS_fUCkZ91JXNl0y7J8WJjQr9P6Cv4cP_V7GQIRRl5)
---
| | Friend,

In case you missed it, a hand-counted, full forensic analysis of 2020 ballots - what is now being called “America’s Audit” - was started up in Maricopa County here in Arizona, proving to be one of the most important accomplishments for Election Integrity to date.

**Arizona Republicans are leading the way on this front, and we are fighting for ballot transparency like nowhere else in the country!**
---
| [HELP US FINISH THE AUDIT!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c71edfeb4f8468585e6fbc5d7178639&_e=LkexT8upeqV0HITURoRhVpuv0g7ZzSEhEkMjXoUJ7hjnwCgj4O-ETPyLeReac4iTAvAROl2y7Ti8-SM_ZwaADmxuGbf5wT4OofIWwVAKslon1Cci483TSzCGYA5gjMDvz-UkINFZz9g_uJgaKagc5JpaSa1wvOEZDcMpuMrWkOvr6Ha_Y3rIjG9igaMUz7WJn6bLbnblgIV7cwrM5BCNY__AKZcDmpwvP2e6laU4SxvCQ1pxpL2nOnAFJaxUloHoUrctNZI7uRqK1e1keTkj4cXw4Th8jlYHfvBqKXz2WtWqlObKPo1vmCs9m7uRdOf3 "HELP US FINISH THE AUDIT!")
---
| Democrats have been panicking the further along this effort goes - **they know that they can’t stop the American people from getting answers and full transparency regarding the 2020 elections! **

_**What are they trying to hide?**_

These Democrats and their media allies are working overtime to try to attack, undermine, and spread lies about America’s Audit, even though the process has been non-partisan - and solely about getting to the TRUTH - from the very outset!

**Allegations of deleted databases, chain of custody issues, and other irregularities deserve to be INVESTIGATED, and we need YOU to help us uncover the facts!**

The truth is that, as long as Americans like you are in our corner fighting for transparency, nothing will stop this effort to secure what all voters should want - **full confidence that our voices are heard at the ballot box!**

clean_body: These Democrats and their media allies are working overtime to try to attack, undermine, and spread lies about America’s Audit, even though the proces|MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | | | Friend, In case you missed it, a hand-counted, full forensic analysis of 2020 ballots - what is now being called “America’s Audit” - was started up in Maricopa County here in Arizona, proving to be one of the most important accomplishments for Election Integrity to date. Arizona Republicans are leading the way on this front, and we are fighting for ballot transparency like nowhere else in the country! | "HELP US FINISH THE AUDIT!" | Democrats have been panicking the further along this effort goes - they know that they can’t stop the American people from getting answers and full transparency regarding the 2020 elections! What are they trying to hide? These Democrats and their media allies are working overtime to try to attack, undermine, and spread lies about America’s Audit, even though the process has been non-partisan - and solely about getting to the TRUTH - from the very outset! Allegations of deleted databases, chain of custody issues, and other irregularities deserve to be INVESTIGATED, and we need YOU to help us uncover the facts! The truth is that, as long as Americans like you are in our corner fighting for transparency, nothing will stop this effort to secure what all voters should want - full confidence that our voices are heard at the ballot box! | "DONATE TO THE ELECTION INTEGRITY FUND" | "PITCH IN $20 TO HELP AMERICA’S AUDIT" | Thank you for helping us continue on with our Election Integrity efforts! name: Sen Scott
subject: The media are fanning the flames of hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We can't let them stay in power.

The liberal media are fanning the flames in what they call a "Republican Civil War." They want us to fight each other while Democrats push an extremist leftist agenda including woke socialism and granting amnesty to illegals.

**We need to fight for conservatism NOT against each other.** [**Help us make up lost ground to the Democrats NOW.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_sen-scott_t1066775-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_the-media-are-fanning-the-flames-of-hate)
---
**[**PITCH IN NOW**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_sen-scott_t1066775-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_the-media-are-fanning-the-flames-of-hate)**
---

Don't forget - Democrats don't just want to cancel you. They want to get you fired from your job and re-educate you so that your views are silenced. We can't let them stay in power. [**Help us take back the Senate Majority.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_sen-scott_t1066775-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_the-media-are-fanning-the-flames-of-hate)
**[**PITCH IN NOW**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_sen-scott_t1066775-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_the-media-are-fanning-the-flames-of-hate)**
---

Every day we fight each other is another day Democrats push their agenda without being noticed. [**We need YOUR help to fight back.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210527_TY-2.101720_sen-scott_t1066775-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210527_the-media-are-fanning-the-flames-of-hate)

Thank you for your support,

Chairman Scott

And in the Senate, just A SINGLE VOTE would give us the Majority. That’s why it’s so important that we fully fund our outreach programs. We have to fire up the Republican Grassroots so we can WIN these battleground races! | Thank you for whatever you can do. Republican Polling Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Alex Padilla
subject: I’m humbly asking you to add your name to my petition and tell the Senate you support the Citizenship for Essential Workers Act
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends ––

One of my first acts in the Senate was to introduce a bill called the
Citizenship for Essential Workers Act. This bill would provide a pathway
to citizenship for the nearly 5 million frontline essential workers who
happen to be undocumented immigrants.

The conversations about the need to update our nation's immigration laws
are not new. We’ve been building on the progress and the momentum from
previous years and previous efforts.

And given the last year that we've been through, I don't see another more
compelling case to be made than to recognize the tremendous service, the
tremendous sacrifices, the tremendous work of our essential workers.

They have been on the frontlines of our pandemic response over the past
year in healthcare, agriculture, food processing, and have earned a
pathway to citizenship. They have worked hard to keep our communities safe
and our economy going during the pandemic and deserve a pathway to
citizenship.

So I’m reaching out personally and asking if you will add your name and
stand with me to say it’s time to create a pathway to citizenship for
these essential workers. I need you with me if we are going to make this a
reality.

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/cosponsor-citizenship-essential-workers-act/?source=em210527-1-full&t=1001&akid=52%2E159979%2Ebv4AzJ ]Please sign my petition and tell the Senate you support the Citizenship
for Essential Workers Act. This is so important.

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/cosponsor-citizenship-essential-workers-act/?source=em210527-1-full&t=1002&akid=52%2E159979%2Ebv4AzJ ]ADD YOUR NAME

Undocumented workers are an essential part of our economy and deserve not
only safety in the workplace, but dignity and a pathway to citizenship.

And for all the workers that have been here for years, paying taxes and
serving during the course of a once-in-a-century global health pandemic,
let's give them the security to live without fear of deportation and put
them on a pathway to citizenship.

We cannot stop fighting until undocumented workers finally receive a
pathway to citizenship. But Senate Republicans are hard at work trying to
put a stop to our momentum on this issue and many other issues.

That’s why this is so important, and why I’m humbly asking you today:

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/cosponsor-citizenship-essential-workers-act/?source=em210527-1-full&t=1003&akid=52%2E159979%2Ebv4AzJ ]Add your name to my petition — tell the Senate you support the
Citizenship for Essential Workers Act.

This bill would be a big step in the right direction and will go a long
way in our economic recovery.

I hope you’ll consider joining me and adding your name,

—Alex

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=52%2E159979%2Ebv4AzJ
clean_body: [1]Alex Padilla for Senate Friends –– One of my first acts in the Senate was to introduce a bill called the Citizenship for Essential Workers Act. This bill would provide a pathway to citizenship for the nearly 5 million frontline essential workers who happen to be undocumented immigrants. The conversations about the need to update our nation's immigration laws are not new. We’ve been building on the progress and the momentum from previous years and previous efforts. And given the last year that we've been through, I don't see another more compelling case to be made than to recognize the tremendous service, the tremendous sacrifices, the tremendous work of our essential workers. They have been on the frontlines of our pandemic response over the past year in healthcare, agriculture, food processing, and have earned a pathway to citizenship. They have worked hard to keep our communities safe and our economy going during the pandemic and deserve a pathway to citizenship. So I’m reaching out personally and asking if you will add your name and stand with me to say it’s time to create a pathway to citizenship for these essential workers. I need you with me if we are going to make this a reality. [ ]Please sign my petition and tell the Senate you support the Citizenship for Essential Workers Act. This is so important. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Undocumented workers are an essential part of our economy and deserve not only safety in the workplace, but dignity and a pathway to citizenship. And for all the workers that have been here for years, paying taxes and serving during the course of a once-in-a-century global health pandemic, let's give them the security to live without fear of deportation and put them on a pathway to citizenship. We cannot stop fighting until undocumented workers finally receive a pathway to citizenship. But Senate Republicans are hard at work trying to put a stop to our momentum on this issue and many other issues. That’s why this is so important, and why I’m humbly asking you today: [ ]Add your name to my petition — tell the Senate you support the Citizenship for Essential Workers Act. This bill would be a big step in the right direction and will go a long way in our economic recovery. I hope you’ll consider joining me and adding your name, —Alex You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Taking our fight for justice to new levels
body:
Because standing strong now is the most important thing you can do to defend the rule of law under the U.S. Constitution

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch has unquestionably become the American people's "independent counsel" of record, and we are changing the course of history with our _independent research and investigations_.
We are taking our fight for justice to new levels, continuing to investigate serious scandals and bringing accountability where it is due, including:

* Then **Vice President Joe Biden 's** threats to withhold aid from **Ukraine** to cover up the corrupt ties between his son, **Hunter Biden** and the sleazy Ukrainian energy company, **Burisma** ; and further evidence of Biden family corruption in **China;**
* The **Deep State** 's four-year effort to corrupt our government and undermine our constitution in order to destroy the **Trump administration;**

* The **Biden administration 's** failure to enforce **S. Immigration law** , and the resulting massive new wave of out-of-control **illegal immigration;**

* Threats to the **integrity of our elections** from states that fail to take reasonable steps to clean their voter rolls as federal law requires.

**_Congress should be investigating these matters with all the powers at its command_** _!_
But since that likely won't happen and because Judicial Watch doesn't play by **Washington Establishment** rules, **_[I’m asking you to join our fight by making your best donation to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55790&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjcxNjA4MDE=)_** today.
**And right now, that is especially important...**
**... because no matter _who_ is in the White House or _who_ controls Congress, _America needs Judicial Watch as an independent non-partisan watchdog whose only loyalty is to the rule of law, the U.S. Constitution and the American people 's right to know what its own government is up to_. **
**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55790&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjcxNjA4MDE=)_** , you can be sure that we'll continue to investigate corrupt politicians from both political parties - Republican _and_ Democrat. And we will break through the walls of government secrecy to investigate, expose and, when necessary, prosecute public corruption.
**_[With your best gift](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55790&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjcxNjA4MDE=)_** - I can promise you we will keep working to honor the trust you have placed in us as _America 's most effective government watchdog_! Thank you.
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton President

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ovquIdRDBSGpUQqVcTdgXf0q1WBmDwJHz0JJyFS0avBtSp6XDnQYP7h9UXA1uRgFqHMfUmjkh6JzmikQ0Om1ywNlPg2xvfGCW6acqQzdZo1XfgIQPTBduL09JcgPwgdIoTL-apDSNh4=&c=0lGhPzDvqbV9S9fdfPJu3zLzgCD02yv5uIVeN-BHaUu42SZPsRFMDA==&ch=nMpoIzv7CulM1gg-x3LE-W2FkCHjZOVA61MWf4xtXUgYbA-2P5GFmw==).

name: Official AOC Shop
subject: New drop: the ‘Abolish ICE’ t-shirt is here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Shop our new ‘Abolish ICE’ t-shirt and help build our movement to boldly reimagine our country’s broken immigration system.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210527-2122-header&t=1&akid=2122%2E2526796%2EPTA2IJ)
With a new Congress and a new Administration in the White House, we must seize this moment and keep up the pressure to go bigger and bolder on reimagining our immigration system.
**The path forward is clear: We must abolish ICE** — because an institution that has embraced violations of people’s fundamental human rights cannot be reformed.
[If you agree, you can make your stance heard loud and clear with our new ‘Abolish ICE’ T-shirt.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8971?t=2&akid=2122%2E2526796%2EPTA2IJ) Illustrated by Queens-based artist Jeff Deng, all proceeds will go toward building our movement to boldly reimagine our country’s broken immigration system from a carceral system into one that centers humanity, combats injustice, and unites families.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8971?t=3&akid=2122%2E2526796%2EPTA2IJ)
**[Shop the new ‘Abolish ICE’ T-shirt](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8971?t=4&akid=2122%2E2526796%2EPTA2IJ)**
Recently, Alexandria joined her colleagues including Rep. Pramila Jayapal and FIRM Action — the nation’s largest immigrant rights network — to introduce the Roadmap to Freedom Resolution.
The Roadmap to Freedom is a bold, progressive vision for immigration reform. [Your purchase of an ‘Abolish ICE’ t-shirt will help fund our work to educate our communities about this bold resolution and organize to get it passed — click here to shop now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8971?t=5&akid=2122%2E2526796%2EPTA2IJ)
Pa’lante,
Team AOC
