clean_body: Shop our new ‘Abolish ICE’ t-shirt and help build our movement to boldly reimagine our country’s broken immigration system. With a new Congress and a new Administration in the White House, we must seize this moment and keep up the pressure to go bigger and bolder on reimagining our immigration system. The path forward is clear: We must abolish ICE — because an institution that has embraced violations of people’s fundamental human rights cannot be reformed. Illustrated by Queens-based artist Jeff Deng, all proceeds will go toward building our movement to boldly reimagine our country’s broken immigration system from a carceral system into one that centers humanity, combats injustice, and unites families. Recently, Alexandria joined her colleagues including Rep. Pramila Jayapal and FIRM Action — the nation’s largest immigrant rights network — to introduce the Roadmap to Freedom Resolution. The Roadmap to Freedom is a bold, progressive vision for immigration reform. Pa’lante, Team AOC | | Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Jeff Foy
subject: for my wife
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
You don’t hear from me often. I’m Jeff, Jennifer’s husband. I’m behind the scenes a lot but I’m reaching out before Jennifer’s critical filing deadline tonight.

Jennifer might not say this to you herself, but I will: she is working so hard. Jennifer is not one to back down from a challenge (you should have seen her at track practice in college, or prepping for trials at our kitchen table when she was a public defender) -- and I know she’s ready to be governor. Tonight’s a big night for her campaign. She knows her showing tonight will have a direct impact on the primary in less than two weeks.

**That is why I’m reaching out to ask you to donate to Jennifer’s campaign. Here’s a link:**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_final](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oftorIDvbh03T4zseNfzkMC3IO-76yXi_r6LvExR3Kn7Ho0HbWyKVNLTnC4zFxFVorIpEipYqn6Eid76a3Yi4sxgse_W2FZyorlSjuL_QiLUhB5-sfy9x2CbGKMWTUfp4LM01njQDaGKpkrRnHYstyN_sNq81XFK8wwA4dfkEuUA16XNZwR_RttT0L6jGMgCJoNYcJTkr5oQdADT7-4w29iPJ9u3dwa8DeReXoTXL5wbXD4ojG9ApsYy1NaLBEDXT3YNS1c3-UrGpn7VU59b7CUb1xWShRotd-LNcvPxj4YM/3c9/8BufzCMlQ8-afmT6QFnrYQ/h0/NWpJoNK7YHU2-n0xJsWuwN43anZa0nqQnhf17jzDROM)**

I know Jennifer, and you do not tell her "no."

* She was told, “No, you can’t graduate from the Virginia Military Institute” -- _but after the Supreme Court’s landmark decision to open its doors to women, she did and she was one of the first women to do so._

* She was told, “No, you can’t run for office while pregnant” -- _but when she ran for Delegate while pregnant with our twins, she not only won, she flipped a Republican district from red to blue._

**Polling shows Jennifer has momentum to defy the odds again and be elected as the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[This is the moment to donate to her campaign if you can. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oftorIDvbh03T4zseNfzkMC3IO-76yXi_r6LvExR3Kn6JJg74yp6DduuA2faQard78bNzfG2zzjb8Ms6KmOBc-Qfd1SsKX5Oo-tWWXhg-CTqK_1mLk-QyFI9ew0vxYV5RBtUaJkLRRXgpMxSYsCkst3TZDDGKGnfWhOSho92nOupZmDlFDx0lQwmg9b8caEujkEek-ftiYNMcVqNO2Ck6WYqDR1y44itlladAgWCJntCaBgMx4V8ua6HcuQhoi2nYcNxAVEqrbq-hGDZ8rPL4-YMJEGOxktKAFYDkPBbfMao/3c9/8BufzCMlQ8-afmT6QFnrYQ/h1/1yf9PiOE1Cx35FFXeL8Qld-pzAmz6DR2Um-ZuMb4pNU)**

I’m so proud of my wife, and I’m asking that you have her back in this final “sprint” to the primary (I’m a track coach -- I couldn’t help myself with that one). Thank you for everything you have done to power her campaign to this moment.

Thanks,

Jeff

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MCJL725NJdXWCYYanATAhlJ_ij8eZ3vYrTrhoMbVUw-mj9If5VVtbScx1uQQd0atLbSuFJ9NEk5EkNYWAat9OhEbdfwgzw0_ZsLyaqnNluoIpppGSKeVaoZpYCn30mKdA_iFesaImR_54WhHC3kVOD5uBk4M-kKQGzjHwZSuCcuMv1QYfdii5qSg7pTVuYVHkA/3c9/8BufzCMlQ8-afmT6QFnrYQ/h2/Oz3YOD5GP3fptGXT5wmc7CDDDzCW29Rr44JLcQCMjEE)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKax8JItCsNjewz1rcaeLI7SQ1f723sAA6w6xNslZhbLFQ_srNnM0XaEyy4nDtZ-CP7fs73qXwZ4yROv8b1zgre-MXVSh1_WI5taPcOSp-4knqWNiQ5Cyvui3R6cwbSKFh-GyyZZJYFl8f9374YWtBAqWLMgjQ9PWSBW7j-hzkrwFfSnxZdDKp712mt3H_KDDeAQ/3c9/8BufzCMlQ8-afmT6QFnrYQ/h3/D0HhMrE8SDhZv8vae0V1ISdE0vJ4qJPAxqEFYYXcyLc) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 156 House Democrats agree on this. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m leading a pressure campaign with over 155 Democrats to urge Biden to act right now.
#
Peter,
I led more than 155 House Democrats today in calling on President Biden to expand Medicare as part of his next big piece of legislation. It’s not the first time I’ve emailed you about this — but since then, our movement has only gotten bigger.
Not only do we have 156 House Democrats (PLUS nearly 20 Senate Democrats) with us, but the coalition spans the ideological spectrum. We have progressives pushing for Medicare expansion, but we also have many of my more moderate colleagues on board. We even have 15 “frontliners” (Democrats in the toughest re-election races) signed on to this effort, because they know that expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug costs are hugely popular among voters from all political parties.
**[President Biden made campaign promises to expand Medicare and lower prescription drug costs, and now we’re working hard to ensure he follows through on those promises. Chip in $3 or more today and fuel our fight for real, transformative health care reform as we build towards Medicare for All.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210527?refcode=em20210527-324&t=19&refcode2=324_420207_kTVLx0&akid=324%2E420207%2EkTVLx0)**
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210527?refcode=em20210527-324&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=324_420207_kTVLx0&akid=324%2E420207%2EkTVLx0)**
A full 70% of Democrats in the House, including folks in tough re-election fights, support expanding Medicare, improving benefits, and lowering prescription drug costs because it’s good policy — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them. Opening Medicare to millions of new folks gets people care who didn’t have it before, and lowering prescription costs can help people finally get the medicine they need to survive.
Again, here’s what we’re calling on President Biden to support in his next big bill:
* **Lowering the Medicare eligibility age:** This would immediately extend coverage to 23 million people, including many who lost insurance during the pandemic.

* **Improving Medicare benefits to finally cover dental, vision, and hearing care, and cap out-of-pocket costs:** This will give folks on Medicare much needed coverage to see the dentist, get hearing aids, and afford a new pair of glasses.

* **Empower Medicare to negotiate drug prices for everyone:** The U.S. spends far more than any other country on prescription drugs, despite Medicare Part D being the largest purchaser. We need the government to use its power to negotiate drug prices down for everyone.

These are widely popular measures and President Biden promised to deliver on them. Medicare for All is our end goal, and I’ll never stop leading the fight for it. But as we continue building our movement, we can pass this transformative Medicare expansion plan right away.
Fewer people will struggle without care, fewer people will struggle to get hearing aids and critical dental care, and fewer people will have to ration their insulin or go without the medicine they need.
**[That’s what we can deliver on with your help. Contribute what you can today as we make this historic push for expanding and improving Medicare. We need everyone doing their part to get this done.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210527?refcode=em20210527-324&t=21&refcode2=324_420207_kTVLx0&akid=324%2E420207%2EkTVLx0)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210527?refcode=em20210527-324&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=324_420207_kTVLx0&akid=324%2E420207%2EkTVLx0)**
I will keep you updated on our push for expanding Medicare as our organizing continues.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210527-324-footer&t=23&refcode2=324_420207_kTVLx0&akid=324%2E420207%2EkTVLx0)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=324%2E420207%2EkTVLx0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=324%2E420207%2EkTVLx0)

body:
Do you think Covid leaked from the Wuhan lab?
Friend,
Whether or not the Covid leak came from the Wuhan lab has been long suspected and is now a viable theory, as Ron made clear in the letter he wrote to the National Institute of Health earlier this week.
_Did the Covid-19 leak come from a Chinese laboratory?
Did the United States fund this laboratory?
Has China and the Wuhan Institute of Virology been lying to us?
And if so, is Fauci, the NIH, or the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases responsible for it?_
We deserve to know the answers to these questions, Friend -- it is critical that we find out what went on in China. What do you think?
[_**Do you think Covid-19 originated in the Wuhan lab?**_](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCFcSJf-EcX0xsR6-M5P6YM_JRGya4qxFJw6rsSnhXfXTg0uU22D1abzgKjX7_ogdBoG9t3uQeepVT2W_JWcTrulRaJCLJw3BwR3Cu9dbtowDxIZPaTL8DLPjxEpIgOvPhVmuEPfREVS0X43N9IKl_I8yZR-kMlU2nUI0ZBpXidvUcadqOgbk1MuaGwzSgQMTggCbfOp8LMBWum6M4DX0vVBTqv2PHnBSEuR87JnoDR_QVBdryfAi85BgPhhtrh7MUUnWgJOeT8H0iH6Y5YOraYSyglWMrn5nDPFxtWG0RTrptDACnuyWl4JmWWdU9NWXFls0czEZA7_bPoKKfaR5ifqfGbd8TxrEp8ORHHi9DBR50O_i3AmuA==&c=2SyCDhu5cHtHh2UJRBDYxMzyWLO4m0HqJOD0Hwz0rfoTlD_4dIu1Uw==&ch=psvZwgX6Kul4Rk6A3R3A9xLND6XAOMdWRGMee1U4IuLqtgV1GaoesA==)

name: Deandrea Newsome
subject: No other candidate in this competitive race has the moral backbone to support a transformative platform that includes all of these urgent policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica Smith is unapologetic about her progressive agenda and our anti-establishment moral movement.
#
Hi y'all, it’s Deandrea!
In just a moment, [**_I’m going to ask you to donate whatever you can to help reach our critical fundraising goal of $7,000 before May 31._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1900?refcode=em20210527-118&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=118%2E3698%2Er8xE1H)
**But first, can I hear it one time for all the women with BACKBONE?!! Can I hear it one time for Erica Smith?! 👏👏👏**
There are many, MANY reasons why electing Erica to the U.S. Senate is so urgent. Erica would be the first Black woman in history to represent North Carolina. But in my opinion, the most important thing about Erica is that she is unapologetic about her progressive agenda and our anti-establishment moral movement.
**There is only ONE candidate running for Senate in North Carolina who has backbone and supports ALL of the following policies, and that’s Erica Smith:**
⭐ Medicare for All
⭐ Free education (including pre-k, K-12, and college)
⭐ A Green New Deal
⭐ Reparations
⭐ Canceling student loan debt
No other candidate in this competitive race has the moral backbone to support a transformative platform that includes all of these urgent policies. _Not our establishment Democratic opponents, and certainly not our spineless Republican ones._
Our campaign is our best shot at electing a progressive Black woman to the U.S. Senate in 2022. And without the Democratic establishment’s checkbooks on our side, I have to ask:
[**_Will you please make your first donation of $5 or more to our campaign today? In order to send Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate, we MUST be as unapologetic in supporting our progressive movement as she is._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1900?refcode=em20210527-118&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=118%2E3698%2Er8xE1H)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1900?refcode=em20210527-118&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=118%2E3698%2Er8xE1H)**
Thanks for hearing me out! More soon,
Deandrea
Deandrea Newsome
Campaign Chair
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210527-118-footer&t=22&refcode2=118_3698_r8xE1H&akid=118%2E3698%2Er8xE1H)**

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: why I'm running to replace Paul Gosar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
When I defeat Gosar, our district will have a real change when it comes to representation.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29854610/287725026/-1338678480?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210527-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmE0ZDk4OC0yY2JmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1G4LaPnXCZWuj279jLp53hpK4OfxFu35pOFD8R8eyk=)
---
| Hi there, friend!

I wanted to tell you a little more about why **I’m running for Congress to defeat Paul Gosar.**

Paul has been serving in Congress since 2010. Since then, he’s found far too many ways to disappoint and embarrass the people of Arizona.

body:
Friend --
Tonight at midnight is our final fundraising deadline of this campaign. As Jay's finance director, I'm tracking the numbers 24/7, and I can tell you that we're within striking distance of our primary funding goal. But we need to raise another $10,000 before midnight to stay on track.
**[Take a look at Jay's message below and please chip in before midnight if you're able.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzV53BapVj4eJaq3HMefNQSGzkQUpEqE3-d-rGK2fQU=/_uRD652s2vW3J6Nb_Y92GvDTqNmY4m7EPEdIutK_SJk=)**
Jay is running for Attorney General because we've made progress in building a more fair and equitable Commonwealth, but we all know we have not come far enough. We need leaders who will rise to this moment in our history and create real change in our justice system. Jay will be that leader.
\- Lesley

_Begin forwarded message:_
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzV53BapVj4eJaq3HMefNQSGzkQUpEqE3-d-rGK2fQU=/GJFrTOBQ2L63dwuoVLFx0iUph1K0HfCNHX7qsb-O0DE=)
---
Friend -- I wanted to make sure you saw my email yesterday about our final fundraising deadline of our primary campaign at midnight tonight. Election Day is less than two weeks away, and we almost have the money we need to spread our message to every corner of our Commonwealth and get out the vote. But we still have some work left to do. [**If you 're with me, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign before our deadline tonight at midnight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzV53BapVj4eJaq3HMefNQSGzkQUpEqE3-d-rGK2fQU=/_uRD652s2vW3J6Nb_Y92GvDTqNmY4m7EPEdIutK_SJk=) Governor Ralph Northam, former Attorney General Mary Sue Terry, Congresswoman Elaine Luria, Congressman Bobby Scott, and over 30 of my colleagues in the state legislature have endorsed my candidacy because they believe we have the vision and values to beat Republicans in November and reimagine this old office in a new way. I will rise to meet the demands of this moment and reach for the ceiling, not settle for the floor. **[I hope I can count on you to contribute to our campaign before midnight so we have the resources we need to win on June 8 and in November.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzV53BapVj4eJaq3HMefNQSGzkQUpEqE3-d-rGK2fQU=/_uRD652s2vW3J6Nb_Y92GvDTqNmY4m7EPEdIutK_SJk=)** \- Jay Jones

| Fellow Conservative, I’m sure you already heard that my opponent “Little” Adam Kinzinger and his RINO pal Liz Cheney voted for Nancy Pelosi’s sham January 6th Commission. And I know you agree with me that IT IS TIME to kick Never Trumpers like Adam Kinzinger and Liz Cheney out of Congress, AND... **...replace their RINO butts with America First conservatives who’ll fight for you and the 74 million patriotic, pro-Trump Americans!** **[So, I hope I can count on you to support my critical campaign with your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or any other amount today.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9f5eccc61fdb441c87271839d6c2c36b&_e=MmCSJvGigaChKQRDMGdBAWTcmYfUQjolZHWarSJNR1i8TuXRsmMG9hhW9TqNbYJZIR28t9kXQzyxtiYwYuHrY-dBmYAYtn4oTOhoklb8A2ArGRKCcLu3OM0y2QALU2UCpwdmRc3kOQlfV_Kdk8bUaHajRssojPn7yh1TpN0ryK541TpnK-AhbhRrssSt1Gc_XcrV-1v6Rr_kEvIglB1SWojV2iwrHpOQJnri4mRG26ay32iUq7Zw0SJrhS7wvWBgXB5iUSguFSlgI8F7AKQq3ZtHqv1mJ-UxMj4P5zxvC28L_Rg352RtGZLFEKcwolYkMbuXnKsmqF4IENcQgqr0_g%3D%3D)** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9f5eccc61fdb441c87271839d6c2c36b&_e=MmCSJvGigaChKQRDMGdBAWTcmYfUQjolZHWarSJNR1i8TuXRsmMG9hhW9TqNbYJZIR28t9kXQzyxtiYwYuHrY-dBmYAYtn4oTOhoklb8A2ArGRKCcLu3OM0y2QALU2UCWjK-IeSI3narXScl1LwIQb5WAzdiYBxONTRv2MON1WnFc20dieM6SZHXQJSTueIXUniiO1Cld4aBb6Qbc4I-61CSsKiSGB5mkVvIOejkSaNXq6uwl2jqq7xmRXzRibNXzYZmEDe-I49wSqqfJmfFxaXB3LhGhRnmFhnDeYCwYKDb46l8-PLCmtHsV8n-KnuGlKX3KGusOirou5w2HvMk-A%3D%3D) As he does as a regular guest and friend of Fake News CNN and MSNBC, Adam is only interested in attacking conservatives like you and me! * **Wrecked the lives of countless hardworking Americans** by burning down and ransacking their businesses, AND

Friend,

__**[Did you hear the news?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l9k4gUjasAWFZPvZ4avqKX37sfuZ4fIIzz3x0e_gvE6SJ0lhmdmFYZ5C73yy69jRqJ4t-thaPTZDBymi6JRnPg-pXWEelr6jMR15WqoBWuDpOkiBp9enfJbpRYlWpysiEM-kbiVRqlM9FsLiijhlKUZsNh59vZHP2jr9zjVCPHt12i1Qz1mLYA==&c=6D4n2Y_AQASTl2-YAXWhhfPD39BRqgfdtxdwL2U5Ynktm_ZdGAVUsw==&ch=yK8QmpdUKVtTqhd8dmo-I0eGsgEeL-FqyUUiO4-btJXAQNCEzVLlwQ== "Did you hear the news?") ** _ _ Absent Abby is back. Today, we learned Abby Finkenauer is starting to plan a run for Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley in 2022.

Why is this so shocking? For one, Abby's former constituents couldn't locate her on a map in 2020. Abby refused multiple debates called by Ashley Hinson and the local press. She was ultimately defeated for repeatedly hiding from the voters of Iowa's 1st district, and now, she thinks she can run to represent the whole state! We can't let Nancy Pelosi's protege make a comeback.

Absent Abby's announcement today shows that liberal special interests are eyeing Iowa as a potential pickup for their radical agenda. We can't allow that to happen!

Here at Team Hinson, we are dedicated to keeping Absent Abby as far from the U.S. Capitol as possible. We also know what Iowans know: __**[Chuck Grassley is a relentless conservative fighter for all Iowans!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l9k4gUjasAWFZPvZ4avqKX37sfuZ4fIIzz3x0e_gvE6SJ0lhmdmFYZ5C73yy69jRqJ4t-thaPTZDBymi6JRnPg-pXWEelr6jMR15WqoBWuDpOkiBp9enfJbpRYlWpysiEM-kbiVRqlM9FsLiijhlKUZsNh59vZHP2jr9zjVCPHt12i1Qz1mLYA==&c=6D4n2Y_AQASTl2-YAXWhhfPD39BRqgfdtxdwL2U5Ynktm_ZdGAVUsw==&ch=yK8QmpdUKVtTqhd8dmo-I0eGsgEeL-FqyUUiO4-btJXAQNCEzVLlwQ== "Chuck Grassley is a relentless conservative fighter for all Iowans! ") ** _ _

Chuck Grassley supports our state's ag economy. He stood up for what was right during Brett Kavanaugh's nomination. He is a true public servant who has always championed Iowans' interests over special interests. **He will never stop fighting for us.**

**[ Help Ashley and all of us here at Team Hinson send a strong message that we support Chuck Grassley today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l9k4gUjasAWFZPvZ4avqKX37sfuZ4fIIzz3x0e_gvE6SJ0lhmdmFYZ5C73yy69jR8KM0K5cQe6dJUgmJcxAX-UmoJbtPR8YnLyLRndW6MTbyv30rc_7sVbSbjCmTKZf0VDdWLbokolmUYSdpADKO0p4XACL7oKk0vDyG59JCLHA7aT4uJB67E2th61w2OtchCOEGY4IE4JfUoQj-Z9V3_xPplKMkDwqmEqcd1YrTiKHWLCUNZIEhg6PYq227oEGIrPkuXTbUvQH8_XiZwpm_tAeYPnx0eN1pulbzFMSK-ss5LxQ4ClqAWGvbLQ5St_tn3ugIAH2jyWrysVmKiwEu8l-EG_TqdKnyJe3zqeuCdiKRNsjRsNcsA0DY-EnvpPTW3OLMmUTWwHRQMWbanaFArA==&c=6D4n2Y_AQASTl2-YAXWhhfPD39BRqgfdtxdwL2U5Ynktm_ZdGAVUsw==&ch=yK8QmpdUKVtTqhd8dmo-I0eGsgEeL-FqyUUiO4-btJXAQNCEzVLlwQ== "Help Ashley and all of us here at Team Hinson send a strong message that we support Chuck Grassley today!") ** If you can chip in $15, $20, $25, or any amount NOW it will go a long way to silence the special interests backing Abby Finkenauer's candidacy and keep Absent Abby from ever holding elected office again.

clean_body: | | | | | == "HELP STOP ABSENT ABBY!" Friend, == "Did you hear the news?" Absent Abby is back. Today, we learned Abby Finkenauer is starting to plan a run for Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley in 2022. Why is this so shocking? For one, Abby's former constituents couldn't locate her on a map in 2020. Abby refused multiple debates called by Ashley Hinson and the local press. She was ultimately defeated for repeatedly hiding from the voters of Iowa's 1st district, and now, she thinks she can run to represent the whole state! We can't let Nancy Pelosi's protege make a comeback. Absent Abby's announcement today shows that liberal special interests are eyeing Iowa as a potential pickup for their radical agenda. We can't allow that to happen! Here at Team Hinson, we are dedicated to keeping Absent Abby as far from the U.S. Capitol as possible. We also know what Iowans know: == "Chuck Grassley is a relentless conservative fighter for all Iowans! " Chuck Grassley supports our state's ag economy. He stood up for what was right during Brett Kavanaugh's nomination. He is a true public servant who has always championed Iowans' interests over special interests. He will never stop fighting for us. == "Help Ashley and all of us here at Team Hinson send a strong message that we support Chuck Grassley today!" If you can chip in $15, $20, $25, or any amount NOW it will go a long way to silence the special interests backing Abby Finkenauer's candidacy and keep Absent Abby from ever holding elected office again. | | == "HELP ASHLY SUPPORT CHUCK GRASSLEY" | | | == "HELP ASHLY SUPPORT CHUCK GRASSLEY" | | | == "HELP ASHLY SUPPORT CHUCK GRASSLEY" | | | == "HELP ASHLY SUPPORT CHUCK GRASSLEY" Stand with Ashley & Chuck Grassley! == "Say NO to Absent Abby in ‘22>>> " Thank you! body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29857855/287736031/2005830277?refcode=20210527_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmRkOGEwYS0zN2JmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aorFTiW5T85BJm0_YYZVFJ2BUrsqdXh1rDbYpcYCiOA=) Friend, Our May end-of-month fundraising deadline falls on Memorial Day this year, which means we’re going to have to make some serious headway towards our fundraising goal **over the next 48 hours.** Thanks to the Biden Administration, more than 130 million Americans have been fully vaccinated and more than half of the country has received at least one dose. Many of us may even be lucky enough to gather in small groups to celebrate the beginning of summer this weekend. Among other things, the progress we’ve made with President Biden and Vice President Harris should remind us that elections have consequences—and the stakes are high. An unprecedented rollout of the COVID-19 vaccine was made possible by an administration that cares about science and listens to the experts. That’s why we have to start thinking about the midterm elections and laying the groundwork to make sure Democrats hang onto our razor-thin majorities in Congress. _The GOP knows how important the midterms are and they’ve already begun building their comeback operation. They’ve even telegraphed how they plan to use gerrymandering in several Red states to take back the House._ [**In the next 48 hours, we need 250 grassroots supporters to step up and make a contribution of any size to help us with our May fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29857858/287736032/2005830277?refcode=20210527_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmRkOGEwYS0zN2JmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aorFTiW5T85BJm0_YYZVFJ2BUrsqdXh1rDbYpcYCiOA=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29857860/287736033/1866411932?refcode=20210527_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmRkOGEwYS0zN2JmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aorFTiW5T85BJm0_YYZVFJ2BUrsqdXh1rDbYpcYCiOA=)
Your generous contributions help position us to have a strong fundraising quarter and build the resources necessary to fight back against the GOP, their super PACs, and hold onto our House and Senate majorities. Thank you for anything you can give, and thank you for everything you’ve done as we recover from the pandemic. We couldn’t do any of this without your support. clean_body: | | | = Friend, Our May end-of-month fundraising deadline falls on Memorial Day this year, which means we’re going to have to make some serious headway towards our fundraising goal over the next 48 hours. Thanks to the Biden Administration, more than 130 million Americans have been fully vaccinated and more than half of the country has received at least one dose. Many of us may even be lucky enough to gather in small groups to celebrate the beginning of summer this weekend. Among other things, the progress we’ve made with President Biden and Vice President Harris should remind us that elections have consequences—and the stakes are high. An unprecedented rollout of the COVID-19 vaccine was made possible by an administration that cares about science and listens to the experts. That’s why we have to start thinking about the midterm elections and laying the groundwork to make sure Democrats hang onto our razor-thin majorities in Congress. The GOP knows how important the midterms are and they’ve already begun building their comeback operation. They’ve even telegraphed how they plan to use gerrymandering in several Red states to take back the House. = = Your generous contributions help position us to have a strong fundraising quarter and build the resources necessary to fight back against the GOP, their super PACs, and hold onto our House and Senate majorities. Thank you for anything you can give, and thank you for everything you’ve done as we recover from the pandemic. We couldn’t do any of this without your support. I’m working hard in Congress to support Nevada families. President Biden has my full support on the American Families Plan, which will be hugely beneficial for our state.
We’re fighting for:
* **83,000 new jobs in Nevada** in childcare and prekindergarten industries
* **Universal preschool** for three- and four-year-olds in Nevada
* **Two free years of community college** for our students
* A groundbreaking **paid family and medical leave** program
* Tax credits to drastically **cut child poverty** in Nevada

But _**we won’t be able to continue making progress like this if we lose this seat to one of my Republican opponents.**_
[**_That’s why it’s so critical that we reach this fundraising goal. name: Michael Whatley
subject: President Trump is going to ask me about you, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
What do you want me to tell him?
| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, When I see President Trump next weekend, I know he’s going to ask me for a list of every Grassroots Republican who stepped up to support him as he mounts his comeback campaign. _**KEEP READING BELOW**_

Fellow American,

On June 28th and again on July 3rd, 2020 the Second Amendment to the United States Constitution saved the life of not only myself, but my wife’s life.

When the angry Fascist Black Lives Matter mob came marching toward our home, we did what many of you reading this email right now would do: w**e grabbed our guns to protect our home and our lives**.

**Turns out our Founding Fathers were onto something** when they decided to prominently place Americans’ rights to keep and bear arms into the Constitution.

**[My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m running for the United States Senate to protect our Second Amendment rights which are under attack from President Biden and Washington Democrats.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4215c82de39a4e19812e917406806bd0&_e=dJz1mYPJ9Iln1XYDbIv79mBQKA3uMeWaJgLkuuPjOxDslYj8gaPBBXDwtPZ30L-GZAOH4fOO9NbucVHzUd4jgoeohtzEQ0DClgzAZcIQyOfOkm4-oOziWBzJtEXtLYgwO6lS_pbsCLvXug63ZNhUqn2DR7wOeRqZ6Pz1kA-PB5sVi5SnR5UCCkdh7PycE7KtQjesqMwiJm3PtfQpqeLpRf9NESH38IfmJAl3Ex2yRQnsbRyAAoCm-q_J_1hXIh6MqH4km42nCUw1BcYb1JuwfQKWJjoiOtA7GHR9dAZQlQ3X9eHIJZhyPAX6Qenby3N9tZ5ATQSXYCU9QfKvXfYCZ9cQe2nav2Fh7soPgj9doxoxzt_3FSqZzp7OBO_1hC15N9GfSB1OGDjXSS3CDy5FUn2dx91CRN8ITioeAHSIfYP7fUXY3V26tG2IJLzDW_MrKlS2ehDDhv8T21RO9dpMXUk3UAFnpEskgy9GtaUgkcthGmNZjHZG4XB06ci0Cs6NLqPgn5E3t3RZuvmHuSSCs8zvhCaV0plo7nFBao35lrA2bWFgNX7PcqdAOdkd31xiVC9OxrRuTquYthR1_yC4sNZFJpf60GkcC_qwiDNMRsUOSTVhoLDdaRz-WloKeBTi)**

**[I’m gathering signatures for a petition I’m planning to submit in-person to the White House in support of 2A rights and I’m asking you to add your name today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4215c82de39a4e19812e917406806bd0&_e=dJz1mYPJ9Iln1XYDbIv79mBQKA3uMeWaJgLkuuPjOxDslYj8gaPBBXDwtPZ30L-GZAOH4fOO9NbucVHzUd4jgoeohtzEQ0DClgzAZcIQyOfOkm4-oOziWBzJtEXtLYgwO6lS_pbsCLvXug63ZNhUqn2DR7wOeRqZ6Pz1kA-PB5sVi5SnR5UCCkdh7PycE7KtQjesqMwiJm3PtfQpqeLpRf9NESH38IfmJAl3Ex2yRQnsbRyAAoCm-q_J_1hXIh6MqH4km42nCUw1BcYb1JuwfQKWJjoiOtA7GHR9dAZQlQ3X9eHIJZhyPAX6Qenby3N9tZ5ATQSXYCU9QfKvXfYCZ9cQe2nav2Fh7soPgj9doxoxzt_3FSqZzp7OBO_1hC15N9GfSB1OGDjXSS3CDy5FUn2dx91CRN8ITioeAHSIfYPUG8tnWos0MWJYTXbtJ-7eU5oMmWdmPmqacvSvbtm60UbzN3SvjyLCTQ7k69m_0qzIFqbjUqmsbJAwoGoCN84BOzTqdr_LH-hRVvnnGgOqanDNnTi4OGDg62AGGJh8It48qxpf8RIhfxNuMqNmTqnPnPHMGevxn9XLnAVdNWJYCSG9x3SDStGy_poCVbzAsPPFc8b-vroY4l45TB1GBJp2)** Typically, the White House won’t acknowledge a petition with less than 100,000 signatures; that’s a lofty goal, but **if you and everyone reading this email today signed on** , we would quickly reach our goal.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4215c82de39a4e19812e917406806bd0&_e=dJz1mYPJ9Iln1XYDbIv79mBQKA3uMeWaJgLkuuPjOxDslYj8gaPBBXDwtPZ30L-GZAOH4fOO9NbucVHzUd4jgoeohtzEQ0DClgzAZcIQyOfOkm4-oOziWBzJtEXtLYgwO6lS_pbsCLvXug63ZNhUqn2DR7wOeRqZ6Pz1kA-PB5sVi5SnR5UCCkdh7PycE7KtQjesqMwiJm3PtfQpqeLpRf9NESH38IfmJAl3Ex2yRQnsbRyAAoCm-q_J_1hXIh6MqH4km42nCUw1BcYb1JuwfQKWJjoiOtA7GHR9dAZQlQ3X9eHIJZhyPAX6Qenby3N9tZ5ATQSXYCU9QfKvXfYCZ9cQe2nav2Fh7soPgj9doxoxzt_3FSqZzp7OBO_1hC15N9GfSB1OGDjXSS3CDy5FUn2dx91CRN8ITioeAHSIfYOLbyQORdpmffVtBBUqI4kAxlZ4bie5o5wgUBNJ4WByboA4d1w8kdd4HLTxEzoud7m4IF3J709HHBvsnx2c-Wb7IoSavwGh7PHN09O4N5wBmDm7UjQIW9E3LqRcdyC4X1LTuqQ-mp8HZRs_ku3rQ1n1aNVMvJhwqcI60kcGM4B6cJb00Ph_Yo5IzJN6Fj9Wcar-Wjfy5Ho4Bq6Bf0n9-PvJ)
**The Supreme Court hasn’t banned assault rifles yet, but if President Biden stacks the Supreme Court as Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are urging him to do, it will only be a matter of time.**

As I witnessed last summer from the front porch of my home, **people can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control pretty quickly**.

Some may say that I’m not the real deal or that I’m trying to ride a viral moment to the Senate. That would be false. My wife Patricia and I have spent a considerable amount of time ensuring a bill in the Missouri legislature– which would prevent state law enforcement officials from enforcing federal laws that would prohibit the manufacture, ownership and use of firearms –passed into law.

I will never back down. I may be running for Senate in Missouri, but I’m running to be a senator for all freedom-loving Americans.

**[I hope you’ll sign my petition to protect the Second Amendment today. Democrats see strength in numbers, and if we reach 100,000 unique signatures the Swamp can’t ignore us.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4215c82de39a4e19812e917406806bd0&_e=dJz1mYPJ9Iln1XYDbIv79mBQKA3uMeWaJgLkuuPjOxDslYj8gaPBBXDwtPZ30L-GZAOH4fOO9NbucVHzUd4jgoeohtzEQ0DClgzAZcIQyOfOkm4-oOziWBzJtEXtLYgwO6lS_pbsCLvXug63ZNhUqn2DR7wOeRqZ6Pz1kA-PB5sVi5SnR5UCCkdh7PycE7KtQjesqMwiJm3PtfQpqeLpRf9NESH38IfmJAl3Ex2yRQnsbRyAAoCm-q_J_1hXIh6MqH4km42nCUw1BcYb1JuwfQKWJjoiOtA7GHR9dAZQlQ3X9eHIJZhyPAX6Qenby3N9tZ5ATQSXYCU9QfKvXfYCZ9cQe2nav2Fh7soPgj9doxoxzt_3FSqZzp7OBO_1hC15N9GfSB1OGDjXSS3CDy5FUn2dx91CRN8ITioeAHSIfYP7h_QcCkC_XU7QGtZDfI57LTYTJK00coCUP-EyS84ujO1wwL73amvVbOsDW6Zl_GOq0iiojwrizYnQbB60IifXI1TdNyhQMgqoPMkxS86CapXxaHhJRpY0e8_Q70Av-0Gi1sg2IYn3Ufv2lKkUnrVhcOL3cTvkgTGRpdtnwOqAoQJ-K5y-yNUdSiF4RsMq_AkfONCnlxOjqIPzqWDomQ5C)**

name: Karen Bass
subject: Five
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
This month, I voted in support of a bill that will launch a full investigation into the January 6 insurrection. But to the surprise of no one, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell is organizing Senate Republicans to block the bill.

McConnell's political circus tells us what we already knew, friend: Even after defeating Donald Trump in 2020, **Trumpism is still alive and well in Congress.**

I won't let extremists get a foothold in the House majority when so much is on the line, including critically overdue policing reform. But Republicans are only FIVE seats away from taking back the House. They're already launching attacks against vulnerable House Democrats with more to come.

**[We've beaten the odds before, so I know we can defend our fragile majority in 2022. But I need your help to do it. Our team set a goal of raising $10,000 before the end-of-month deadline on Monday. Will you chip in what you can before the deadline to help me protect the House?](https://act.myngp.com/el/d8rixmKHCjJRrFtWZ1YvcurK8PMJ4Lc6FwusS7BwtJc=/KVmV0ZZb99XC2bAzLzg6u6Knn71rcK-ARlyYnWBr_Gg=?gpsid=39_132_19112&refcode=em21_210527_eom1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210527_eom1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

The truth is, America can't afford to lose the Democratic House majority -- not when working families are counting on the House to keep delivering bold policing and democracy reform and relief.

_So let 's get to work._

**[Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to our campaign before Monday's deadline to help defend the Democratic House majority. I'm hoping I can count on you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/d8rixmKHCjJRrFtWZ1YvcurK8PMJ4Lc6FwusS7BwtJc=/KVmV0ZZb99XC2bAzLzg6u6Knn71rcK-ARlyYnWBr_Gg=?gpsid=39_132_19112&refcode=em21_210527_eom1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210527_eom1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

-- Karen

Who is protecting our communities and fighting for American families? | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2b38de9ba6574aae98377ab9805652af&_e=Z7qNH5uE-zBWBYlxGJ0-2H9003cz5VXLnq8gLZHFw5s_PAoeHJQU9RClTb64KTvtOE3ld78csk7wDlDolQNuC6v-HbxtvZrR6wOTmhFZsFWSGnyIOgIqUzkX_s68-gByjrXykcZwNExeeUYpB5csA1RZM47fhJwJ0xOxiJasjsbxrzsKoRnajV6ivvmDsbhWTt83Abd6nQLlj-p3i0-5TOcGbxm6LRus9N-S2-8PZwnpBR--UmG149Mix8EorFEfjxA10y__FB5gnpgUw6ZH_UqV4GjfFJUVPVDaRlb27VrRtk2fkL0G7s0buIWnZMMpQio7gAw4RXQTy5KkxzesEUhtEP8PnsIPK6t0qPMQSiWKOwXFEx5KS98nLSfz9ts3kFavpwe8agfy7zGGKaTLv-snSoutQmvaN3CV760uaw2GMaZ7vIN8gQX8G-7yaNb4ydEjZgKmQoH-C5ZEPYWHvlmjySRokextZh5bNicl3M8YYhoHBmfFfvWgTvUAQyiMicxhHFaylNKJzHrVc2ZukXmBerNv3wpbFQf7_01K2-qU_aWh5jzTJHwqcr2UQAn-)

Peter, I have one question for you ...

**Who in Washington is looking out for us?**
While schools and businesses struggle due to Democrat lockdowns, and border patrol agents deal with a crisis from Biden’s open border policies - who is protecting our communities and fighting for American families?

**My name is Jose Castillo, a proud conservative Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 9th Congressional District to flip this seat RED.** The Left is dismantling President Trump’s border policies, raising taxes on hardworking Americans, defunding the police, and killing the economy with strangling government regulations on businesses.

This isn’t the America our founding fathers envisioned. _In fact, these policies are anti-America._ **Our values are under attack.** We need leaders who will:

✅ STAND for our freedoms
✅ DEFEND our rights
✅ PROTECT our Constitution

That’s why I’m running for Congress. To be a strong voice for our freedom and liberties. To be the one person in Washington looking out and fighting for YOU.

I am working night and day to see that our conservative agenda is fulfilled, and ensure _**we build the wall, back the blue, protect the unborn, and defend our 2nd Amendment.**_ You know, the type of policies that actually put the American people FIRST.

I will bring a loud conservative voice and presence to Washington, but I need to know I have your support, [**will you endorse my campaign for Congress?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2b38de9ba6574aae98377ab9805652af&_e=Z7qNH5uE-zBWBYlxGJ0-2H9003cz5VXLnq8gLZHFw5s_PAoeHJQU9RClTb64KTvtOE3ld78csk7wDlDolQNuC6v-HbxtvZrR6wOTmhFZsFWSGnyIOgIqUzkX_s68-gByjrXykcZwNExeeUYpB5csA1RZM47fhJwJ0xOxiJasjsbxrzsKoRnajV6ivvmDsbhWTt83Abd6nQLlj-p3i0-5TOcGbxm6LRus9N-S2-8PZwnpBR--UmG149Mix8EorFEfjxA10y__FB5gnpgUw6ZH_UqV4GjfFJUVPVDaRlb27VrRtk2fkL0G7s0buIWnZMMpQio7gAw4RXQTy5KkxzesEToBveDh4w-GAn0jdxoAHoVERGPzzg9CQrV0ojw5Hmn_fhm_5n6d7YQn5Anf_MDF3ybvbZmFOCQJQOKJE8MAO4uA3_HGyq1jHDiEzeqBiENnZlZjXe1IxLI5jIvOLi_RXOW9c7l2NMWv77gj4PSzVDgf8BpqjNzyNGO8yHMn_tTGFn7d0hA4SMiL3ApcgntCOQY2b1_1hF00RpBsws72_u02Fk5BG2aUhb6XpdIV1NM5)

| [**Endorse Jose ⇒**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2b38de9ba6574aae98377ab9805652af&_e=Z7qNH5uE-zBWBYlxGJ0-2H9003cz5VXLnq8gLZHFw5s_PAoeHJQU9RClTb64KTvtOE3ld78csk7wDlDolQNuC6v-HbxtvZrR6wOTmhFZsFWSGnyIOgIqUzkX_s68-gByjrXykcZwNExeeUYpB5csA1RZM47fhJwJ0xOxiJasjsbxrzsKoRnajV6ivvmDsbhWTt83Abd6nQLlj-p3i0-5TOcGbxm6LRus9N-S2-8PZwnpBR--UmG149Mix8EorFEfjxA10y__FB5gnpgUw6ZH_UqV4GjfFJUVPVDaRlb27VrRtk2fkL0G7s0buIWnZMMpQio7gAw4RXQTy5KkxzesEYdohRehfBgXkPk2LbpdHLNu2UhNQV7bpbp6O5s8MpNmKQvJ514Qgkwtoj0tjlD3LBOLQCKJXTKxwMIt5DoYTXvsUu_0x-tF5xTtipc-akYdMk4PD5XSYYonYIMMY60IA21L4lBety0t_lEFd5FA-lHLUOx0fEh6gJrEqXOlSves6iVf6SG51c_yn3DEhZ-yOKc8PMauZ7OdbP0U2ZRe_w93RZ1_5abW3gIF0DREfZgW)

Who is protecting our communities and fighting for American families? | - Peter, I have one question for you ... Who in Washington is looking out for us? While schools and businesses struggle due to Democrat lockdowns, and border patrol agents deal with a crisis from Biden’s open border policies - who is protecting our communities and fighting for American families? My name is Jose Castillo, a proud conservative Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 9th Congressional District to flip this seat RED. The Left is dismantling President Trump’s border policies, raising taxes on hardworking Americans, defunding the police, and killing the economy with strangling government regulations on businesses. This isn’t the America our founding fathers envisioned. In fact, these policies are anti-America. Our values are under attack. We need leaders who will: ✅ STAND for our freedoms ✅ DEFEND our rights ✅ PROTECT our Constitution That’s why I’m running for Congress. To be a strong voice for our freedom and liberties. To be the one person in Washington looking out and fighting for YOU. I am working night and day to see that our conservative agenda is fulfilled, and ensure we build the wall, back the blue, protect the unborn, and defend our 2nd Amendment. You know, the type of policies that actually put the American people FIRST. This can be the blueprint for all of Wisconsin and our country. We can pass a $15 minimum wage, an infrastructure bill that will repair our crumbling roads and bridges, and so much more -- but we need to ensure that Democrats hold on to our majority in the Senate.

clean_body: Ron Johnson has spewed racist comments, conspiracy theories, and continues to vote against much-needed Legislation that would help Wisconsin. | = = Peter, as I finish off our first tour around Wisconsin, I’m thinking about what I’ve heard from people across our state. Ron Johnson has spewed racist comments, conspiracy theories, and continues to vote against much-needed legislation that would help Wisconsin. He is one of America’s worst Senators, but I’m running for more reasons than to just defeat Ron Johnson. = I’m running to be a champion for progressive legislation. Paying workers family-sustaining wages, providing them with good benefits, and treating everyone with the dignity and respect they deserve shouldn’t be controversial. At the Bucks, we’ve shown that it’s possible to do all of this while still running a successful and profitable business. This can be the blueprint for all of Wisconsin and our country. We can pass a $15 minimum wage, an infrastructure bill that will repair our crumbling roads and bridges, and so much more -- but we need to ensure that Democrats hold on to our majority in the Senate. Right now, with a 50-50 split, this race will be one of the most-watched races in our country. That’s why CNN ranked this seat as the third most competitive Senate race in the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Alex Lasry | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. Box 511549 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ## Run-Off Election Day is June 5, 2021
---
On behalf of our organization we have a FEW local races in Texas that are in the run-off right now! We ask that YOU, Family, and Friends go out and vote in these local elections to make sure we DO NOT elect Socialist/Communist to our local offices. If you do not live in these areas please share our message and encourage friends and families that do live in these areas to go out and vote now. Each candidate supports having public services (ex. first responders) without raising taxes, economic development, infrastructure, and all support our small businesses! Early Voting going on now until June 1st. No voting Sunday and Monday and day of election is June 5, 2021
---
First Stop San Antonio! Patrick Von Dohlen for City Council District 9 Visit VotePatrick.org

clean_body: That’s how we arrived at our new goal. | Friend, My Finance Team and I looked over Tony Evers’ fundraising reports to set our monthly budgets. As it stands, we still need to raise another $12,460 to ensure we reach our goal and are able to compete with Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising. Now that the governor’s race has been rated a toss-up, beating Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising is our chance to take the upper hand in this election. That’s why I’ve authorized a MATCH for the next 30 minutes on all contributions. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Rick Larsen
subject: We can rebuild our nation’s infrastructure AND fight climate change

In fact, investing in our nation's infrastructure is essential to finally addressing our climate crisis.** Leading environmental organizations have called the plan before Congress "the greenest transportation bill yet". We cannot miss this opportunity to act. clean_body: | | | I believe we can rebuild our nation's infrastructure andfight climate change. In fact, investing in our nation's infrastructure is essential to finally addressing our climate crisis. Leading environmental organizations have called the plan before Congress "the greenest transportation bill yet". We cannot miss this opportunity to act. The benefits of a green infrastructure plan are too important. It would create millions of family-wage jobs, rebuild our aging roads, bridges and highways and take big steps forward to save our planet. Our children, their children, and future generations are counting on us to get this right. So are families right now. Team — we’ve accomplished a lot lately with the help of **[grassroots donations!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29860802/287745004/333614831?refcode=MTH_em_20210527_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_TH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjJjNjdkYi00MWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_dXBoGNZXEgZvi_4PC9Iy0FF40KkFKtQbpvjM-gsGs=)** :
* We are getting closer to the end of this pandemic — **we’ve fully vaccinated _half_ of American adults and partially vaccinated _70%_ of New Mexicans.**

* We are fighting for legislation to make life better for our families and our climate. That includes the _Electrifying America’s Future_ resolution Martin introduced to take on the climate crisis and strengthen our economy by creating millions of good-paying jobs.

* And we are creating grassroots support to get out the vote for Melanie Stansbury, **_whose special election in New Mexico next week could determine whether Democrats keep the House majority._**

There’s so much work left to be done, though, which is why we need to reach our May fundraising goal. _**Right now, we’re not on track to meet our goal by May 31.**_ **Will you pitch in $10 or any amount you can so Martin has the support to keep up this crucial work for New Mexico and our country?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29860803/287745005/333614831?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210527_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_TH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjJjNjdkYi00MWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_dXBoGNZXEgZvi_4PC9Iy0FF40KkFKtQbpvjM-gsGs=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29860804/287745006/333614831?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210527_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_TH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjJjNjdkYi00MWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_dXBoGNZXEgZvi_4PC9Iy0FF40KkFKtQbpvjM-gsGs=)

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: Making California more affordable and livable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
My campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. Read more >>
Peter, It’s been one month since the California Secretary of State verified that we had have enough signatures to move forward with the recall. I’ve been on the road most days since then, meeting with many of you who are just as eager for a California Comeback as I am to lead it. You’ve stepped up, and are helping spread the word about my plans to fix what is broken in California. With your continued support, we can make it the land of golden opportunities once again. Other candidates in this race are a lot of talk, but **I have robust,** **concrete plans to make California more affordable, and more livable. ** I need your help now more than ever to get the word out. We have a critical deadline quickly approaching at MIDNIGHT on May 31st, and we need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal of $12,000 to head into the summer months STRONG. **Please RUSH a grassroots donation now to help spread the word to every single Californian that there is real hope for tomorrow — as soon as we get Newsom OUT OF OFFICE!** [**RUSH A GRASSROOTS DONATION NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5271f97ecf511527/a7b6a6866abbbc9cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Once they set an official date for the recall election, things are going to move very quickly. Please send the grassroots support my team needs to make sure that I’m the one to replace Gavin Newsom when he finally is forced to step down. Thanks for your help,
Kevin Faulconer [**Donate now >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5271f97ecf511527/fa44b717056f3909c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5271f97ecf511527/e23145d48e720636c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5271f97ecf511527/83d4f19da3934605c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5271f97ecf511527/b3c443ec2952d78ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5271f97ecf511527/7b4955926ba779bcc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

clean_body: My campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. Read more >> Peter, It’s been one month since the California Secretary of State verified that we had have enough signatures to move forward with the recall. I’ve been on the road most days since then, meeting with many of you who are just as eager for a California Comeback as I am to lead it. You’ve stepped up, and are helping spread the word about my plans to fix what is broken in California. With your continued support, we can make it the land of golden opportunities once again. Other candidates in this race are a lot of talk, but I have robust, concrete plans to make California more affordable, and more livable. I need your help now more than ever to get the word out. We have a critical deadline quickly approaching at MIDNIGHT on May 31st, and we need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal of $12,000 to head into the summer months STRONG. Please RUSH a grassroots donation now to help spread the word to every single Californian that there is real hope for tomorrow — as soon as we get Newsom OUT OF OFFICE! Once they set an official date for the recall election, things are going to move very quickly. Please send the grassroots support my team needs to make sure that I’m the one to replace Gavin Newsom when he finally is forced to step down. Thanks for your help, Kevin Faulconer | | | | | ---|---|---|--- id:2021-05-19-15:49:08:918t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021

body:
| | | When Jeff called to let me know that he wanted to email Jennifer’s supporters, I couldn’t say no. I wanted to make sure you saw this message and remind you that we are just hours away from the**FINAL** filing deadline of the primary season.

Have you donated yet? Here’s the link:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_final](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oftorIDvbh03T4zseNfzkMNtCEllFxKqXsGOgDBPnciNZoDd-cMUduVfLn26c6nyIuf4PSdLFD1Jow4UmmKztkBWFhqMjIpUOv5ee0r6sikh_vsOIr4PO-B-7W8VL1P6bUts0mIw1VNT59L6jwQmIP8Yu_qu_NsxSpVmTwvZXVsOagh2YRvz03gDArWl44eOEHIjrkFvGkVJKRsAeTNnOB0MIhxjAVcj8RDb-wWG6hgr5H0Zoieakta9IcAu_KiMUeGKPNjcX1GF6ivklzwBoCJds63NeoN647NRCB5Ak9T4/3c9/3olGW07lRFGvDx4GT47Qxw/h0/eLvXUnDPYd6doYn5cdVhVvdL_1e6D0BVvNkFrJK3QxM)**

\- Greta

_Senior Advisor_

Begin forwarded message:

>
> You don’t hear from me often. I’m Jeff, Jennifer’s husband. I’m behind the scenes a lot but I’m reaching out before Jennifer’s critical filing deadline tonight.
>
> Jennifer might not say this to you herself, but I will: she is working so hard. Jennifer is not one to back down from a challenge (you should have seen her at track practice in college, or prepping for trials at our kitchen table when she was a public defender) -- and I know she’s ready to be governor. Tonight’s a big night for her campaign. She knows her showing tonight will have a direct impact on the primary in less than two weeks.
>
> **That is why I’m reaching out to ask you to donate to Jennifer’s campaign. Here’s a link:**
>
> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_final](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oftorIDvbh03T4zseNfzkMNtCEllFxKqXsGOgDBPnciOPoV_1p5cNWiUOJ1c_ApOOYCL9BDH6ZsXGQlaO1qNjrb8Q8LrS9w8cBS5NxIGmbxuYhw4gdUdM-ArjcXaLNsckf3Z_UoSTJBXC4uS6wHC_pRyLwsdNwtLOhqE0-jSQPuq87IwIQqMaju9SAt1J47gVsCNWnDOpWv-a30icQQH8gdxwiDGi1o0So0VNX9ga8KpbL_7_L7wa7q117xYQpN8aa8CdkmfNLHbpaJ8XzUzMEtO1o9QuAvVbIWvjOYlnMD8/3c9/3olGW07lRFGvDx4GT47Qxw/h1/dLjaS6Wh0Ak0qTUllKOVT6JGMwehstR0vNfDeLtU_ug)**
>
> I know Jennifer, and you do not tell her "no."
>
>
> * She was told, “No, you can’t graduate from the Virginia Military Institute” -- _but after the Supreme Court’s landmark decision to open its doors to women, she did and she was one of the first women to do so._
>
>
> * She was told, “No, you can’t run for office while pregnant” -- _but when she ran for Delegate while pregnant with our twins, she not only won, she flipped a Republican district from red to blue._
>
**Polling shows Jennifer has momentum to defy the odds again and be elected as the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[This is the moment to donate to her campaign if you can. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oftorIDvbh03T4zseNfzkMNtCEllFxKqXsGOgDBPnciMVGVooWFwwWyOLZuPP3Vz1XNPErVov4qgsNO7H_43eMzYrZmnoQ0JQPEc0z7XmS7i1y2aLTb75Ro_b-AZhKD0_cd5vb_9ZoOKt5CsnIhScluah9ksfV-LaSi5ety8m6i6zwGOmBP98NBEqBqpL6WWkXsIERNiiPaH-62Pj9xyuGB8ufVHGavF-nbQMppgNPzE8k-HGYzUSKkqBv_bDvAtIVYGem4JCaInnw93U_0F6x0atdU7XrPSRfJle2IoVc1o/3c9/3olGW07lRFGvDx4GT47Qxw/h2/j8GR5p8lGJ957ecDbO0iOcsofJ4phUbQ38DsAlyiYGo)**
>
> I’m so proud of my wife, and I’m asking that you have her back in this final “sprint” to the primary (I’m a track coach -- I couldn’t help myself with that one). Thank you for everything you have done to power her campaign to this moment.
>
> Thanks,
>
> Jeff
>

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. subject: BREAKING: Sean Hannity’s Senate pick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Sean Hannity is urging Chris Sununu to run for Senate | | |
---
Hi there, Republicans are lining up to encourage far-right Republican Chris Sununu to run against Senator Maggie Hassan. FIRST, POLITICO reported that Mitch McConnell launched a “full-court press to woo Sununu.” THEN, extreme FOX News host Sean Hannity brought Sununu on his show and said he’s been urging Sununu to run. Hannity even repeatedly called him “Senator Sununu.” The Senate majority could come down to New Hampshire, and an extreme Republican is the last thing Granite Staters need. It’s CRITICALLY important that we show our strength now, early on. **[Maggie only won her last race by 1,017 votes and with Republican interest in New Hampshire growing, we have to raise an additional $10,000 today. But we only got into this great position because of people like you doing whatever you could to help, so now we’re asking for your input. We’re depending on your insight to help us answer crucial questions: Do you support electric vehicles or high-speed rail? Do you have problems with bridges or potholes in your community? Are there any issues specific to your area that you don’t want overlooked? [We chose you as one of only [5] Cresco Democrats for this exclusive survey, so please make sure to fully submit your response to ensure accurate data for your area. ]( | Thanks in advance, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: "Fake News," the fight for life and more....
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f2b2ef943f)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## The truth about “fake news” stories from the Trump admin start to come out...
This year we hit a new low for American [trust in the media](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e7bf373a5c&e=f6564bbe3b). Between the hypocrisies, corrections and hidden agendas in the mainstream media, it doesn’t come as a surprise to those of us who have been paying attention. I’ve said for awhile too many in the media are more concerned with being first than being right, but that is a point for another time.What is more interesting about this right now is many in the media have blamed distrust of the media on [Trump for calling outlets and stories “fake news](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=28facfe069&e=f6564bbe3b).”
I hope the irony is not lost on you that the victim of the most fake news, President Trump, is being blamed for people no longer trusting the mainstream media that reported all of these fake stories.
| | | |
---
## The fight for life...
The left has been using the phrase “follow the science” when criticizing the right on COVID policies, yet don’t follow their own standard when it comes to protecting the lives of the unborn. This week on _Spicer & Co_ we have dedicated a series to the fight for life and those involved in it.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b0be603592&e=f6564bbe3b)
One story that stands out is Claire Culwell’s. Claire was raised in an adoptive household and later in life discovered she survived an abortion. Her birth mother went in for an abortion that Claire survived, but her twin did not.She told us about her journey of forgiveness and grace and how she has used her story to help others and help in the fight to protect life. Watch [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1c601018e6&e=f6564bbe3b).
| | | |
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f478b30176&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6442b971b6&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
This week on Spicer & Co, we’re doing a series on the fight for life. To prepare, I’ve been reading Lila Rose’s new book [“Fighting for Life: Becoming a Force for Change in a Wounded World.”](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3292f9e3fd&e=f6564bbe3b)Lila joined us last night to discuss the book and provide even more insight into her journey. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f0503cc63d&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---

| | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c9228533a9&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cc14eb145f&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=073ab86065&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6db0b8a3ae&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](mailto:contact@seanspicer.com)

body:
donate before the final deadline at midnight
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29862774/287758767/-2023814932?refcode=20210527_TM_5CA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTEyM2E3YS00YmJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZCYNP6SmecDMSqDwtsR0JrY2-wiIXu9Yh3GzK61Uqo=)

| | Derek,

I know you’ve been hearing from me and my team a lot lately, so I’ll keep this quick.

We have just a few hours left until our last primary deadline, and right now, we’re 546 donations short of our goal.

I won’t sugar coat it -- that’s a lot. It’s not going to be easy to get there by midnight. We’re going to need the biggest surge we’ve seen this entire campaign.

**[Will you step up right now and be one of those 546 donors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29862775/287758768/-2023814932?refcode=20210527_TM_5CA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTEyM2E3YS00YmJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZCYNP6SmecDMSqDwtsR0JrY2-wiIXu9Yh3GzK61Uqo=)**

I know you understand the severity of this situation, but I’ll remind you -- Glenn Youngkin, Donald Trump, and Ted Cruz are watching our fundraising numbers like hawks. They’re ready to do, say, and spend _whatever_ it takes to buy the Virginia Governor’s office. So we need to show our strength now more than ever.

**[We can’t let them win. subject: The proof is in the pudding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We’re challenging Hoosiers to continue pressing forward as One Indiana as we close out this month. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=250b3d18d68948e1a17c339f4940416a&_e=m5y7kgh7m6uzNBlyUkQdWKTrC6oSpPN9rFWHkY98Z9DO1P7iVKo5RIK_RqQEhZ17o8YKh5dUGOINzOZuQLO2FCvdfiA6rjg5FnLECSdY36UGE4OZ0ToHheiDzE-HGZmaOf3VJs7jkDJC-tmYbA375ummScuOXXqqZN7VcfXTDeL-FkvfI5_Sr8QzFccZXB26zf2aoMy3R2Pg6eJ_8sc1x0pIQsuQJ7tThSLBpPgH1OCGCjA3pyEDf71NiI4AB9zQG4iuKsMGW-olSfhaNNmhuxQFMC6SRyqS72BO8NdBdiBhUKDG7bJq5pVDgR64XGsAVnJHUFfzhktlqLQAGWOj2Rjy2Z02dF7qSXN8gLCF6dn74upQSG1PeRg1AJk0GXsP9KxpqI-wAeseO_iWtHNc8U9CrPF4aOdMhCq5EEHyg5BKhJuBsCqsp_VRu_0BeoYP3N7hqTmyq0s3ofrbc67hkGltF-E0QjTnDczCFKU8sYU%3D) |

Friend,

**Indiana is leading the way out of the pandemic behind Governor Holcomb’s common sense conservative policies that put Hoosiers first –– and politics last.**

_Jobs are being created._
_Businesses are booming._
_Records are being broken._

**Meanwhile in other states, failing liberal policies are hurting economies and making it more difficult for American families and businesses to recover.**

_Workers are still sitting at home._
_Businesses are struggling to make ends meet._
_Dismal records that should never be broken are being broken!_

Friend, conservative leadership works, and the proof is in the pudding.

The great Hoosier comeback is in full swing, and we’re on track to make 2021 another banner year with historic investments in education, infrastructure, and job creation initiatives.

**But we can’t stop here, and that’s why we’re challenging Hoosiers to continue pressing forward as** _**One Indiana**_**as we close out this month.**

With your help, we can finish the work that we’ve started together and keep Indiana firing on all cylinders.

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
I am blown away and humbled by the support I have already received in this race for governor. It’s still very early, and GOP leaders from all across K Friend, I am blown away and humbled by the support I have already received in this race for governor. It’s still very early, and GOP leaders from all across Kansas are lining up to join Team Schmidt. State legislators, agricultural leaders, law enforcement officials, you name it... You’ve heard from so many of them already, but I wanted to share some of their words once again. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=dfb3928f1df948cc93c29286247c47f6&_e=xdoj2oBWAdWy94YaX2HVnqUlnfBdiYELHSA4QxP4khM9LfaobCFirvYvl_L8KQnCAYt6J_Nqfg9TTeoC6tI8vMapUSoa6WITNpCI6CCoLldeLryyPZGa0DvXipQJ-sGxphNbPX-P4IzjBoCwAEbp5m-XXuNnCUPI8JWoo_u7pAkcIB84RVf5FANoio23P8W6yreNPVrr9F5-WeViZ-czImxF6Q67DlpxMgNQIEDdHIgFLhpfjV1wlncqnEigZ-TxlF3wbQ8XFyhBITRFPkW7mGURsosjZ43xqTj6KQWfIC6HtbH7QM3-bvK883G0088h8YxU3PofRqG3dprbk-NQQdgCzuA9ibOmrX2gYMQyHcDKixT0mx7oafolPgsOQKCkyEdLTPM9OSnBDTHdInarlakZ132B5Btk0hBD98C_luz6B7XRchVGe1-5GdQ4urCy-BkKtmfdxFXXeGr3_a0jJA%3D%3D) | |
---
[](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=dfb3928f1df948cc93c29286247c47f6&_e=xdoj2oBWAdWy94YaX2HVnqUlnfBdiYELHSA4QxP4khM9LfaobCFirvYvl_L8KQnCAYt6J_Nqfg9TTeoC6tI8vMapUSoa6WITNpCI6CCoLldeLryyPZGa0DvXipQJ-sGxphNbPX-P4IzjBoCwAEbp5m-XXuNnCUPI8JWoo_u7pAkcIB84RVf5FANoio23P8W6yreNPVrr9F5-WeViZ-czImxF6Q67DlpxMgNQIEDdHIgkelLNbGSGgjOG7o3jKNBjpmrag520vtSEYwVUfVM-8NmfWBZoyOu263Ap_YF0iLyrjtoJ8XPtsQnSTduD1kbRykaKepzVdGHDeWDCpObc4cqTT1el8W6R76YO6mC8PjAm0xXOZWIe3p5njX8j-fHwDXwIkDh6klA8JnBsT7x17jSYZ4K93EC7qtPgOsfCdY9ok9Trihqxemm4Jw6uEt_csA-MU8d99iG6b0IZqByNuQ%3D%3D)
Friend, conservatives across the Sunflower State are lining up to join our campaign because they recognize that my experience leading and protecting Kansas has prepared me to hit the ground running in the governor’s office.

name: Lisa Blunt for Rochester
subject: Thanks for your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
[](https://lisabluntrochester.com/) Thanks for joining Team Lisa! You are receiving this message because you signed up for emails on our website. If you don't want to hear from us, you can (Unsubscribe not supported in sample emails) at any time. [](http://lisabluntrochester.com/) Dear friends, Lisa Blunt Rochester brings to Congress a fresh, common-sense approach and believes we can find common ground to help people improve their lives and communities. From day one in Congress, her goals have been to strengthen our economy, expand access to opportunity, and bring people together. Despite the chaos of the daily headlines, Lisa has worked across the aisle to make life better for working families across the country. From improving the financial aid process for college students to helping startup businesses succeed, we've made progress on issues directly impacting millions of Americans. On Election Night 2016, Lisa Blunt Rochester became the First State's first-ever Congresswoman, and the first person of color elected to represent us in Washington. There is so much more that we can accomplish together -- expanding access to high-quality health care, creating jobs through a common-sense, bipartisan infrastructure plan, and more. Don't miss a moment: follow our campaign on social media, and join the conversation: [](https://www.facebook.com/LisaBluntRochester/) [](https://twitter.com/LisaBRochester) [](https://www.instagram.com/lisabluntrochester/) We're glad to have you with us! \-- Team Lisa [**DONATE**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_web#refcode=emailautoreply)
---

Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
---

Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington DE 19810 United States

clean_body: Democrat leaders are advancing a reckless agenda that puts the future of our democracy, our alliances, and our institutions at stake. Peter, I want to talk about the crisis of leadership we see unfolding in Washington. The Democrat majority in charge of our government has made it clear that their agenda comes first –– and everything else comes second. To put it bluntly, they’re advancing a reckless set of legislative priorities that put the future of our democracy, our alliances, and our institutions at stake. Here’s what I mean: Peter, the contrast couldn’t be any more stark. While Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden advance an agenda that would weaken our nation at home and abroad, I’m leading the way alongside other conservative leaders to make America stronger, safer, and more secure. But we need all the help we can get right now. Conservatives need to take back the House in 2022 in order to restore common-sense leadership in Washington and stop this wave of reckless progressive policies. Help us take back the House by clicking on any of the links below. body:
| | | I have a few hours before my filing deadline and I needed to connect. Reminder that this is the final filing deadline before the primary in less than two weeks.

We know the status quo isn’t working. We can move into the future -- but only if we elect new leaders committed to lifting up every Virginian left behind by politics as usual.

Tonight’s filing will give a clear indication of who has the momentum to win. We can say confidently that the media, pundits, and our opponent are sitting by, waiting to scour my report tomorrow morning looking for any sign of weakness.

Here’s the link to give and I hope to see your name on the donor list by midnight:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_final](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oftorIDvbh03T4zseNfzkMPx6a7AClVV7X6pnsaLlIAdkGXBvAH3oTZfINMyFUnRpm1hUTm_aXeS2oKX2dki4UBCKrkPEKbb9zXivhew34gw0MbN24ib7tPy6Z6sICnGW6iG7M_T4sBfmXpxg9Qfpd3ijggTRSNLe2Or-aJiXABaSo-1RVRR0yd6sC_C3-ha7535TEA3gUGVQvYsm1oWUU8-Ciq9TzrPCKAEvqoV-4wGLvB5mvhPGVI8IyYucsyJIp6SDMU5zR8rlVYmNRahYjNZJMCLwuJW64lkRj_bOd-Bs79iZqlDnkGSG_mzT6llg95hjvw4tcYkaLSYb8JQFtieSEzp9RP__DEZZOUgb8zc/3c9/21LrvlU0Qy-zZMmUkEbT9A/h0/URhMOImtRkMlJMzw6Y5lZOZE5fnDtRRLBuPqtKKRAl4)**

Jennifer

P.S. I’m a Democrat, a public defender, a foster mom, a former Virginia delegate -- and if I win my race, I’ll be the first Black woman governor in the history of the United States of America. Donate now to make history: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_final

](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oftorIDvbh03T4zseNfzkMPx6a7AClVV7X6pnsaLlIAd3FzEwfouJdQysfLpXscyUr0wdWSVscDEXpyaQDyBYXgz_-nA0JXWY8k7ctNiX-UnlTYKb9MqG0n8KXYfBAgHCEsaZ5u6Ad_v9fhGmBUJlssojjldahWYvsjUmkM_JDyxXv0BJiQp6LwGe1J5xVppNz803j60nlFAbjUc9F5uf6pxf5rDj4OnIjESZBVUcozA93fy56Hh_4k52JTVrlzudwEycqEa7qeiQsxd3Kt-M9gVfu_8tMGbu3o0NpKMJpE8XPZd384Yj69MBVVoIj5n_OeDMECMrnAN84kWXKgmc_1Cm21UgxvVd10vLaI3iDHs/3c9/21LrvlU0Qy-zZMmUkEbT9A/h1/opHhOtOOby4twRO7fZcLdh4lQ3PPjMcIBLi1eDSgCyk)**
> * * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. clean_body: | | | I have a few hours before my filing deadline and I needed to connect. Reminder that this is the final filing deadline before the primary in less than two weeks. We know the status quo isn’t working. We can move into the future -- but only if we elect new leaders committed to lifting up every Virginian left behind by politics as usual. Tonight’s filing will give a clear indication of who has the momentum to win. We can say confidently that the media, pundits, and our opponent are sitting by, waiting to scour my report tomorrow morning looking for any sign of weakness. Here’s the link to give and I hope to see your name on the donor list by midnight: Jennifer P.S. I’m a Democrat, a public defender, a foster mom, a former Virginia delegate -- and if I win my race, I’ll be the first Black woman governor in the history of the United States of America. Donate now to make history: Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. ** | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via .
