name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Why do we put up with them?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Sellouts must go |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e8e7ce87e5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Republicans will never achieve our policy goals until we stick together and fight as hard as the Dems do. That's just a fact!

I WILL fight, as I have my whole life!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=37244ba73e&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician. I nearly shocked the political world by coming close to beating him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

You know the reason I got more votes in my district than any Republican ever had? **_I never backed down, and never gave an inch! I took it right to the Dems._**

Apparently, the RINOs in Congress didn't get the message- including some from here in Florida:

_Thirty-five House Republicans on Wednesday voted in favor of a bill to establish a commission to investigate the January 6 attack on the Capitol.

Former President Donald Trump this week urged Republican lawmakers to oppose it, saying in a statement: "**Republicans must get much tougher and much smarter, and stop being used by the Radical Left.** "

The result underscores the ongoing division within the GOP over Trump's role in and influence over the party's direction, with many Republicans who had criticized the former president for his role in the events of January 6 - including Rep. Liz Cheney - breaking ranks to vote in favor of establishing a commission.

The bill passed by a vote of 252-175 and was opposed by GOP leadership, Insider's Grace Panetta and Charles Davis reported._

So, this bill was SO bad, that even McCarthy and McConnell opposed it.

The bill begins:

_To investigate and report upon the facts and causes relating to the January 6, 2021, domestic terrorist attack upon the United States Capitol Complex (hereafter referred to as the ‘‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’’)..._

So, let's get this straight. _To the Dems and the RINOs, a couple of guys from Duck Dynasty and some guy in a buffalo bikini, all unarmed, constitute a "Domestic Terrorist Attack"_... but ACTUAL armed rioters burning and looting thousands of homes and businesses, killing dozens of innocent people, across dozens of cities, that's just fine and dandy?

When Congress excuses some kinds of political violence and tarnishes others, that's a good sign their motivation is political, not truth.

_I'm ashamed and angry that ANY Republicans, much less Floridians (Carlos Gimenez and Maria Salazar) voted for this drivel._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=358fc9c932&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**I've been to actual warzones. I've seen an ACTUAL insurrection. You can't have an insurrection without guns. Such an event is usually called a "protest", which is what this was.**__

Look, I don't want to excuse political violence. But I especially don't want to excuse some types and not others. Either violence to influence politics is ok for everyone or ok for no one.

And the "truth commission" of the Dems reeks of political persecution. Already we have seen Constitutional rights abridged by the FBI in their overzealous prosecution of this situation.

For Republicans, this was a "show and tell" moment. We needed to be together to stop this political persecution of our own base. **Instead some woke Republicans joined the Dems, and that's not acceptable. **

**Right now, the Republicans are the only ones standing against Marxism. We have to assume that any Republicans that vote with the Dems, support their radical agenda. **

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll be a thorn in the side of the RINOs from day one!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _I gave him the scare of his life- but now they know I'm coming, and I need your help to finish the job!_

I want to go defend America, like I have always done. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8c66e83e72&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we (the Patriots, because the RINOs are worthless) need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our innocent citizens from political persecution!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ad39c81357&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bc5ff49232&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1aa64c258b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=95d9343a3f&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

You know the reason I got more votes in my district than any Republican ever had? I never backed down, and never gave an inch! I took it right to the Dems. Apparently, the RINOs in Congress didn't get the message- including some from here in Florida: Thirty-five House Republicans on Wednesday voted in favor of a bill to establish a commission to investigate the January 6 attack on the Capitol. Former President Donald Trump this week urged Republican lawmakers to oppose it, saying in a statement: "Republicans must get much tougher and much smarter, and stop being used by the Radical Left. " The result underscores the ongoing division within the GOP over Trump's role in and influence over the party's direction, with many Republicans who had criticized the former president for his role in the events of January 6 - including Rep. Liz Cheney - breaking ranks to vote in favor of establishing a commission. The bill passed by a vote of 252-175 and was opposed by GOP leadership, Insider's Grace Panetta and Charles Davis reported. So, this bill was SO bad, that even McCarthy and McConnell opposed it. The bill begins: To investigate and report upon the facts and causes relating to the January 6, 2021, domestic terrorist attack upon the United States Capitol Complex (hereafter referred to as the ‘‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’’)... So, let's get this straight. To the Dems and the RINOs, a couple of guys from Duck Dynasty and some guy in a buffalo bikini, all unarmed, constitute a "Domestic Terrorist Attack"... but ACTUAL armed rioters burning and looting thousands of homes and businesses, killing dozens of innocent people, across dozens of cities, that's just fine and dandy? When Congress excuses some kinds of political violence and tarnishes others, that's a good sign their motivation is political, not truth. I'm ashamed and angry that ANY Republicans, much less Floridians (Carlos Gimenez and Maria Salazar) voted for this drivel. | | I've been to actual warzones. I've seen an ACTUAL insurrection. You can't have an insurrection without guns. Such an event is usually called a "protest", which is what this was. Look, I don't want to excuse political violence. But I especially don't want to excuse some types and not others. Either violence to influence politics is ok for everyone or ok for no one. And the "truth commission" of the Dems reeks of political persecution. Already we have seen Constitutional rights abridged by the FBI in their overzealous prosecution of this situation. For Republicans, this was a "show and tell" moment. We needed to be together to stop this political persecution of our own base. Instead some woke Republicans joined the Dems, and that's not acceptable. Right now, the Republicans are the only ones standing against Marxism. We have to assume that any Republicans that vote with the Dems, support their radical agenda. Help me get to Congress, and I'll be a thorn in the side of the RINOs from day one! I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. I gave him the scare of his life- but now they know I'm coming, and I need your help to finish the job! I want to go defend America, like I have always done. The reality is clear - we (the Patriots, because the RINOs are worthless) need control of Congress. | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - !
